items.summary_en: ETH Zurich team demonstrates a high-fidelity quantum swap gate using a geometric phase, contributing to more robust quantum operations. The result highlights how geometric-phase techniques can mitigate certain noise sources.
items.summary_zh: 苏黎世联邦理工学院团队利用几何相实现高保真量子互换门，为量子操作的鲁棒性带来新进展，展示了几何相位在抑制部分噪声方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Rescuing old printers with an in-browser Linux VM bridged to WebUSB over USB/IP
items.title_zh: 用浏览器中的 Linux 虚拟机，借助 WebUSB/USB/IP 拯救老印表机
items.summary_en: A project bridges old printers to modern machines by running a Linux VM inside the browser and exposing it via WebUSB/USB/IP, letting legacy hardware print without vendor drivers. The approach unlocks long-tail devices for web-enabled environments and showcases browser-based hardware emulation.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目通过在浏览器中运行 Linux 虚拟机并通过 WebUSB/USB/IP 暴露，连接并驱动老旧打印机，无需厂商驱动即可打印。这种在浏览器层实现的硬件仿真方法，为长期积压的设备重新获得可用性。

items.title_en: Apple Silicon and Virtual Machines: Beating the 2 VM Limit (2023)
items.title_zh: Apple Silicon 与虚拟机：突破两台 VM 的限制（2023）
items.summary_en: Shows practical ways to run more than two virtual machines on Apple Silicon, along with the hardware and software caveats involved. The takeaway is that while feasible with certain hypervisor setups, performance and memory overhead become the main bottlenecks.
items.summary_zh: 揭示在 Apple Silicon 上运行多于两台虚拟机的实际做法，以及相关的硬件与软件限制。要点在于，借助特定的虚拟机/仿真工具可以实现，但性能和内存开销将成为主要瓶颈。

items.title_en: AI may be making us think and write more alike
items.title_zh: 人工智能可能让我们的思考与写作变得更趋于一致
items.summary_en: AI assistance is correlated with more uniform thinking and writing styles among users, suggesting homogenization of ideas and prose.
items.summary_zh: 研究显示，人工智能帮助下人们的思考和写作风格趋于一致，可能削弱表达多样性。该文章讨论教育、创造力和网络话语等领域在 AI 辅助日益普及背景下的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemma 4 Multimodal Fine-Tuner for Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Gemma 4：Apple Silicon 的多模态微调器
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 is a multimodal model fine-tuner designed to run on Apple Silicon, enabling on-device training and fine-tuning without sending data to the cloud. It emphasizes practical on-device ML workflows, performance and privacy, opening up experiments for hobbyists and researchers.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 是为 Apple Silicon 设计的多模态模型微调工具，支持在设备端进行模型微调，无需将数据上传云端。它强调本地化的 ML 工作流、性能与隐私优势，为爱好者和研究者提供更便捷的实验途径。

items.title_en: New iPhone age and identity checks restrict internet freedom in the UK
items.title_zh: 新 iPhone 的年龄与身份检查限制英国互联网自由
items.summary_en: Analyzes Apple's new iPhone update introducing age-verification and identity checks, arguing these measures curb online freedom and raise privacy and surveillance concerns. It situates the change within tech policy and rights debates.
items.summary_zh: 评估苹果最新 iPhone 更新中的年龄与身份验证措施，认为这些做法削弱了英国的网络自由，并引发隐私与监控等议题。将此变动置于科技政策与公民权利讨论中。

items.title_en: PicoZ80 – Drop-In Z80 Replacement
items.title_zh: PicoZ80：可插拔的 Z80 替代处理器
items.summary_en: PicoZ80 provides a drop-in, Z80-compatible CPU core for retro computing projects, enabling hobbyists to swap in a modern core without rewriting software. It aims to simplify hardware design and integration for emulators, FPGA builds, and educational tinkering.
items.summary_zh: PicoZ80 提供一个与 Z80 兼容的、可直接替换的 CPU 核心，方便在复古计算项目中无须改写软件即可替换处理器。该项目旨在简化在仿真、FPGA 构建及教学实践中的硬件设计与集成。

items.title_en: Trump administration orders dismantling of the U.S. Forest Service
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府下令解散美国林务局
items.summary_en: An allegation that the Trump administration ordered dismantling the U.S. Forest Service has circulated, raising questions about the future of federal land management and wildfire response. If true, it would represent a sweeping reorganization with wide-ranging implications for conservation, federal staffing, and land-use data. The piece places that claim in the context of ongoing political battles over environmental policy.
items.summary_zh: 有传言称特朗普政府下令解散美国林务局，涉及联邦林地管理与野火应对等议题。若为真，这将标志一次大规模的政府重组，影响环保、人员编制与林地数据等方面。文中将此事置于持续的环境政策政治博弈之中。

items.title_en: Claude Code login fails with OAuth timeout on Windows
items.title_zh: Claude Code 在 Windows 上因 OAuth 超时而无法登录
items.summary_en: An issue reports Claude Code login failing on Windows due to OAuth timeout, highlighting cross‑platform authentication challenges for AI copilots. Workarounds exist, and the incident underscores the need for robust, user-friendly sign-in flows across OSes.
items.summary_zh: 一个问题报告指出在 Windows 上使用 Claude Code 时因 OAuth 超时而无法登录，暴露了跨平台认证的挑战。常见的解决方法存在，这次事件强调了在不同操作系统上提供稳健、易用的登录流程的必要性。

items.title_en: Nowhere is safe
items.title_zh: 没有一个地方是安全的
items.summary_en: Steve Blank argues no system is truly secure in the modern threat landscape, urging stronger threat modeling and continuous testing. The piece emphasizes resilience over perfection in security practice.
items.summary_zh: 作者指出在现代威胁环境下没有系统能绝对安全，需要更强的威胁建模与持续演练来提升韧性。强调安全应是持续的治理与改进过程。

items.title_en: Generative art over the years
items.title_zh: 生成式艺术的演变
items.summary_en: From algorithmic rule-based systems to neural networks, generative art has evolved with tools that democratize creation and expand creative possibilities; the piece traces historical milestones, techniques, and stylistic trends.
items.summary_zh: 生成式艺术从基于规则的算法发展到神经网络驱动，工具的普及让创作更具民主性，扩展了创意边界。文中梳理了历史里程碑、常用技术与风格演变。

items.title_en: Union types in C# 15
items.title_zh: C# 15 中的联合类型
items.summary_en: C# 15 adds union types to support discriminated unions and safer pattern matching. The change improves expressiveness for branching logic and can reduce boilerplate in data-heavy scenarios.
items.summary_zh: C# 15 引入联合类型，支持判别式联合与更安全的模式匹配。此改动提高了分支逻辑的表达能力，能在数据密集场景中减少样板代码。

items.title_en: After 20 years I turned off Google Adsense for my websites (2025)
items.title_zh: 二十年后我关闭了 Google AdSense（2025）
items.summary_en: After two decades using AdSense, the author stopped running ads on their sites as of 2025, sharing the rationale and observed trade-offs. The post touches on monetization, user experience, and the evolving ad ecosystem, offering lessons for solo developers.
items.summary_zh: 在使用 AdSense 二十年后，作者于 2025 年停止在网站投放广告，分享了原因和观察到的权衡。该文探讨了变现、用户体验以及广告生态的演变，给独立开发者一些经验教训。

items.title_en: Many African families spend fortunes burying their dead
items.title_zh: 许多非洲家庭为埋葬亲人花费巨额开销
items.summary_en: Funeral costs drive financial hardship across many African families, leading to debt and asset depletion. The piece calls for affordable, scalable solutions—community funds, microinsurance, or policy interventions—to ease end-of-life expenses.
items.summary_zh: 葬礼高昂的费用在许多非洲家庭中造成经济负担，常导致债务累积和资产缩水。文章呼吁通过社区基金、微保等可负担、可扩展的解决方案，降低安葬成本压力。

items.title_en: Running out of disk space in production
items.title_zh: 生产环境磁盘空间告罄
items.summary_en: A production launch runs into disk space exhaustion, with notes on symptoms, root causes, and fixes. The piece emphasizes proactive storage planning and instrumentation to avoid similar outages.
items.summary_zh: 一次上线过程中遇到磁盘空间耗尽，文中记录了现象、根因与解决办法。强调提前的存储规划和监控对避免类似故障的重要性。

items.title_en: Nanocode: The best Claude Code that $200 can buy in pure JAX on TPUs
items.title_zh: 纳米代码：用200美元在纯 JAX 上买到的 Claude 代码
items.summary_en: Nanocode showcases Claude code running on TPUs via pure JAX within a $200 budget, illustrating cost-efficient approaches to building AI tooling. The discussion centers on performance, latency, and trade-offs when hardware and frameworks are leveraged together.
items.summary_zh: 纳米代码展示了在纯 JAX 与 TPU 上以约200美元预算运行 Claude 代码，揭示了构建 AI 工具的成本效益方法。内容聚焦于在硬件与框架协同下的性能、延迟与权衡。

items.title_en: OpenAI's fall from grace as investors race to Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的信任滑落，投资者竞相转投 Anthropic
items.summary_en: An analysis of investor sentiment shifting away from OpenAI toward Anthropic, reflecting changes in the competitive AI funding landscape and perceived strategic risks in the LLM space.
items.summary_zh: 分析投资者对 OpenAI 信任下降、资金转向 Anthropic 的趋势，揭示 AI 资金格局与大模型竞争中的风险与机遇。

items.title_en: We moved Railway's frontend off Next.js. Builds went from 10+ mins to under 2
items.title_zh: Railway 前端从 Next.js 迁移，构建时间降至不足两分钟
items.summary_en: Railway migrated its frontend away from Next.js, slashing build times from 10+ minutes to under 2. This showcases how platform-level optimizations and tooling choices can drastically speed iteration and deployments in a SaaS product. The move likely involved shifting tooling, bundling, and deployment pipelines, offering a case study for engineering teams facing long build cycles.
items.summary_zh: Railway 将前端从 Next.js 迁出，构建时间从十多分钟降至不足两分钟。这一改动凸显了底层工具与构建管线的选择对开发效率的巨大影响。对于需要快速验证与迭代的 SaaS 团队，这提供了一个有价值的经验案例。

items.title_en: Instant 1.0, a backend for AI-coded apps
items.title_zh: Instant 1.0：AI 驱动应用的后端解决方案
items.summary_en: Instant 1.0 positions itself as a backend optimized for AI-driven apps, focusing on data accessibility and scalable APIs. It discusses architecture choices designed to accelerate AI app development and deployment, with an eye toward reliability and scalability.
items.summary_zh: Instant 1.0 将自己定位为面向 AI 驱动应用的后端，强调数据可访问性与可扩展的 API。文中探讨了旨在加速 AI 应用开发与部署的架构选择，以及对可靠性和扩展性的关注。

items.title_en: ChatGPT Pro now starts at $100/month
items.title_zh: ChatGPT Pro 现在起价为每月 100 美元
items.summary_en: OpenAI nudges pricing for ChatGPT Pro to $100/month, widening the gap between consumer and professional tiers. The change tests value, features, and cost efficiency for power users and enterprise customers as usage scales.
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT Pro 的月费提升至 100 美元，拉大了个人用户与专业版之间的价格差距。此变动将考验高阶用户和企业客户在价值、功能与成本效益上的取舍。

items.title_en: The End of Eleventy
items.title_zh: Eleventy 的终结
items.summary_en: The piece argues Eleventy may be losing traction as modern front-end stacks demand more dynamic, integrated tooling. It highlights tradeoffs between simplicity and capability in static-site workflows, urging teams to re-evaluate their tooling choices as ecosystems evolve. The author suggests exploring hybrid approaches or newer frameworks that offer better scalability.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为 Eleventy 在当今需要动态特性和集成工具的前端生态中可能逐渐失去吸引力。作者讨论静态站点工作流的取舍，建议团队在生态演进中重新评估工具选择，并考虑更具扩展性的混合方案或新框架。

items.title_en: Research-Driven Agents: When an agent reads before it codes
items.title_zh: 研究驱动的代理：代理在编码前先阅读
items.summary_en: Argues for research-driven agents that read and verify documentation before writing code; discusses the benefits for reliability and safety, plus practical patterns for integrating reading steps into agent planning.
items.summary_zh: 提出“研究驱动的代理”想法，即在编码前先阅读并核验文档以提升可靠性和安全性，并讨论将阅读步骤融入代理计划的实用做法。

items.title_en: Codex pricing to align with API token usage, instead of per-message
items.title_zh: Codex 定价将按 API 令牌使用量结算，而非按消息计费
items.summary_en: Codex pricing will align with API token usage, instead of per-message. This shift ties pricing to actual compute and token consumption, potentially changing costs for longer prompts or code generation. Developers should expect more predictable pricing and may adjust usage patterns accordingly.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将 Codex 定价改为按 API 令牌使用量计费，而非按消息数量。此变动更直接地反映实际的计算成本，长提示和代码生成可能会因此改变成本结构。开发者应期待更可预测的按令牌计费，并据此调整使用习惯。

items.title_en: US appeals court declares 158-year-old home distilling ban unconstitutional
items.title_zh: 美上诉法院裁定158年历史的家庭蒸馏禁令违宪
items.summary_en: A federal appeals court struck down a 158-year-old ban on home distilling, ruling it unconstitutional. The decision highlights how legacy regulations can linger in the code and invites reevaluation of other antique restrictions. For makers and hobbyists, it signals potential growth in DIY spirits while underscoring the need to navigate safety and taxation.
items.summary_zh: 联邦上诉法院裁定一项158年前的家庭蒸馏禁令违宪。裁决暴露出法规体系中的历史遗留条文，促使人们重新审视其他古旧限制的效力。对家庭蒸馏爱好者而言，这可能扩展DIY烈酒的空间，同时也需关注安全与税务合规。

items.title_en: We have a 99% email reputation, but Gmail disagrees
items.title_zh: 我们的邮件信誉高达99%，但 Gmail 不认同
items.summary_en: Despite claiming a 99% email reputation score from one service, Gmail disagrees, leading to confusion about deliverability. The incident highlights variability in reputation metrics and the importance of robust email authentication practices.
items.summary_zh: 尽管某服务给出99%的邮件信誉分，但 Gmail 的判定并不认同，导致投递问题与误解。此事凸显邮件信誉评估之间的差异以及强化 DKIM/SPF 等认证、送达策略的重要性。

items.title_en: Wit, unker, Git: The lost medieval pronouns of English intimacy
items.title_zh: Wit、Unker、Git：英语亲密关系的失落中世纪代词
items.summary_en: The article uncovers rare medieval English pronouns used to denote intimacy, tracing how linguistic forms encode social closeness. It reveals how language shifts reflect cultural norms and how today’s pronoun choices echo centuries-old conventions.
items.summary_zh: 文中揭示用于表达亲密关系的稀有中世纪英语代词，追踪语言形式如何编码社会亲近度。揭示语言演变与文化规范之间的关系，以及当代代词选择在某种程度上延续了数百年的传统。

items.title_en: Phyphox – Physical Experiments Using a Smartphone
items.title_zh: Phyphox：用智能手机进行物理实验
items.summary_en: Phyphox enables physical experiments using smartphone sensors, turning everyday devices into lab instruments. It lowers barriers for STEM education and fieldwork by offering ready-made experiments and data collection tools.
items.summary_zh: Phyphox 让智能手机内置传感器成为物理实验工具，降低教育与现场实验的门槛。通过现成的实验和数据采集工具，方便教师与学生进行动手研究。

items.title_en: LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation
items.title_zh: LibreOffice：让我们结束外界的猜测
items.summary_en: LibreOffice – Let's put an end to the speculation clarifies LibreOffice's official stance to quell rumors about its roadmap. The update emphasizes transparency and ongoing commitment to open-source development, aiming to set expectations for contributors and users alike.
items.summary_zh: LibreOffice 的基金会发布正式更新，结束外界对其未来路线的猜测。文中明确了下一步的计划与治理透明度，并重申对开源开发的长期承诺。

items.title_en: Media scraper Gallery-dl is moving to Codeberg after receiving a DMCA notice
items.title_zh: Gallery-dl 媒体抓取工具在收到 DMCA 通知后迁往 Codeberg
items.summary_en: Gallery-dl, a popular media-scraping tool, is moving its repository to Codeberg after a DMCA takedown notice. This underscores how hosting choices can pressure OSS projects to relocate, and highlights Codeberg as an appealing alternative for projects seeking EU-based hosting and privacy-forward policies.
items.summary_zh: 知名媒体抓取工具 Gallery-dl 在收到 DMCA 通知后将其代码库迁移至 Codeberg。这凸显开源项目在托管平台选择上的压力，以及 Codeberg 作为欧洲基地更注重隐私与合规性的潜在吸引力。

items.title_en: In Japan, the robot isn't coming for your job; it's filling the one nobody wants
items.title_zh: 在日本，机器人并非来抢走你的工作，而是填补最没人想做的岗位
items.summary_en: A report on Japan shows robots taking over undesirable but essential manual tasks, illustrating practical automation adoption and its social implications for the labor market.
items.summary_zh: 报道显示日本的机器人正在接手那些人们不愿从事的关键性简单劳动，反映了自动化在劳动力市场的实际应用及其社会影响。

items.title_en: Sheets: Terminal based spreadsheet tool
items.title_zh: Sheets：基于终端的电子表格工具
items.summary_en: Sheets is a terminal-based spreadsheet tool offering quick data manipulation from the command line, with a focus on minimalism and scripting-friendly workflows. It appeals to developers and sysadmins who want fast, keyboard-driven data work without GUI overhead. It highlights a growing niche of CLI-first productivity tools.
items.summary_zh: Sheets 是一个基于终端的电子表格工具，强调简洁性和可脚本化的工作流，方便在命令行中快速处理数据。它受开发者与系统管理员欢迎，追求无 GUI 的高效键盘操作。凸显了日益兴起的 CLI 优先生产力工具领域。

items.title_en: Muse Spark – Meta Superintelligence Labs
items.title_zh: Muse Spark — Meta 超级智能实验室
items.summary_en: Meta unveils Muse Spark, a project under its Superintelligence Labs aimed at pushing toward more capable, adaptable AI systems. The initiative signals Meta's continued push into AI agents and tool use, potentially shaping how future models orchestrate tasks.
items.summary_zh: Meta 公布 Muse Spark，隶属超级智能实验室，目标是推动更强大、灵活的 AI 系统。该计划表明 Meta 将继续发展 AI 代理与工具整合的路线，或影响未来模型的任务编排方式。

items.title_en: The Image Boards of Hayao Miyazaki
items.title_zh: 宫崎骏的影像板
items.summary_en: An examination of Miyazaki's image boards, the visual planning tools used to sketch scenes and camera work. The boards reveal how early composition decisions, motifs, and storytelling cues evolved through meticulous planning behind Studio Ghibli's animation.
items.summary_zh: 本文解读宫崎骏的影像板——用于分镜与构图的视觉规划工具，揭示关键场景的前期构思如何通过细致的布局、主题和色彩规划逐步形成。

items.title_en: SQLite in Production: Lessons from Running a Store on a Single File
items.title_zh: 生产环境中的 SQLite：单文件店铺的教训
items.summary_en: A practical look at using SQLite in production from a storefront perspective: single-file DB, migrations, performance, and reliability lessons.
items.summary_zh: 从餐饮/小型商店场景出发，分享在生产环境使用 SQLite 的经验教训：单文件数据库、迁移、性能与可靠性要点。

items.title_en: A tail-call interpreter in (nightly) Rust
items.title_zh: 在 nightly Rust 中实现的尾调用解释器
items.summary_en: A tail-call interpreter implemented for Rust nightly, showcasing how tail-call optimization can simplify recursion-heavy interpreters. It offers a compact exploration of interpreter design in Rust with advanced nightly features.
items.summary_zh: 基于 Rust nightly 实现的尾调用解释器，展示了在拥有严格所有权模型的语言中应用尾调用优化以简化递归解释器的思路。该作品为使用 Rust 构建解释器与 DSL 提供了简洁的设计示例。

items.title_en: Pijul a FOSS distributed version control system
items.title_zh: Pijul：一个开源分布式版本控制系统
items.summary_en: Pijul is an open-source distributed version control system grounded in patch-based history and a functional data model, offering a different approach from Git. It emphasizes composability and formal reasoning about changes, appealing to projects seeking alternative VCS semantics.
items.summary_zh: Pijul 是一个开源分布式版本控制系统，采用基于补丁的历史与函数式数据模型，与 Git 提供了不同的语义。它强调可组合性和对变更的形式化推理，适合寻求替代 VCS 语义的项目。

items.title_en: The disturbing white paper Red Hat is trying to erase from the internet
items.title_zh: Red Hat 正在从网上删除一份具争议性的白皮书
items.summary_en: A controversial white paper is being erased by Red Hat, raising concerns about censorship and corporate influence over open-source discourse. The move spotlights how big players can shape publicly available knowledge and potentially suppress critical discussions.
items.summary_zh: Red Hat 正在从网上删除一份具争议性的白皮书，引发关于审查与大厂对开源话语控制的担忧。此举暴露了大型企业对公开知识的影响力及可能压制重要讨论的风险。

items.title_en: Lichess and Take Take Take Sign Cooperation Agreement
items.title_zh: Lichess 与 Take Take Take 签署合作协议
items.summary_en: Lichess signs a cooperation agreement with Take Take Take, signaling collaboration on features, licensing, or policy initiatives. The move shows how open-source platforms partner with external services to scale responsibly while protecting user interests.
items.summary_zh: Lichess 与 Take Take Take 签署合作协议，标志在功能、授权或治理等方面的协作。此举体现开源平台与外部服务的协作模式，以更负责任的方式扩展并保护用户利益。

items.title_en: Intel 486 CPU announced April 10, 1989
items.title_zh: 英特尔 80486 处理器于1989年4月10日宣布
items.summary_en: The 486 introduced on-chip cache and improved architecture, delivering a substantial speedup over 386 and cementing x86 dominance in PCs. This milestone accelerated desktop software development and hardware innovations for years.
items.summary_zh: 486 处理器在1989年4月宣布，带来片上缓存和架构改进，相较于 386 给予显著性能提升，巩固了 x86 在个人电脑中的主导地位。这一里程碑推动了桌面软件和硬件的长线发展。

items.title_en: Afrika Bambaataa has died
items.title_zh: 嘻哈先驱 Afrika Bambaataa 去世
items.summary_en: One of hip-hop's earliest pioneers has died, marking the end of an era in New York's music scene. He helped spawn the Zulu Nation and played a pivotal role in propelling hip-hop from local clubs to a global cultural movement.
items.summary_zh: 早期嘻哈奠基人去世，标志着纽约音乐场景一个时代的结束。他推动 Zulu Nation 的成立并帮助将嘻哈从本地夜店带向全球文化。

items.title_en: Sky – an Elm-inspired language that compiles to Go
items.title_zh: Sky：Elm 启发的语言，编译为 Go
items.summary_en: Sky is an Elm-inspired language that compiles to Go, aiming to bring safer, more ergonomic functional style to Go projects. By targeting Go’s ecosystem, it seeks practical interoperability and smoother state management while offering cleaner abstractions for UI and logic. It represents a thoughtful experiment at the intersection of FP ergonomics and Go's pragmatism.
items.summary_zh: Sky 是一门受 Elm 启发、可编译为 Go 的语言，旨在为 Go 项目带来更安全、更高效的函数式风格。通过面向 Go 生态系统，它寻求实际的互操作性和更流畅的状态管理，同时提供更清晰的 UI 与逻辑抽象。它展示了在函数式编程的易用性与 Go 的务实之间的一个有趣实验。

items.title_en: Computational Physics (2nd Edition) (2025)
items.title_zh: 计算物理学（第二版）
items.summary_en: A comprehensive textbook update on computational physics, covering numerical methods for simulating physical systems and analyzing data. The second edition adds modern techniques and practical exercises that bridge theory and computation.
items.summary_zh: 这本计算物理的教材更新版系统地介绍用于物理系统数值模拟与数据分析的数值方法。修订版加入现代技术与实践练习，帮助理论与计算的结合。

items.title_en: JVM Options Explorer
items.title_zh: JVM 选项探索器
items.summary_en: A web-based explorer for Java Virtual Machine options helps developers discover and compare flags, from GC tuning to JIT and memory settings. It reduces guesswork during JVM tuning and speeds up performance experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个在线的 JVM 参数浏览器，方便开发者查找、对比各类参数及其用途，包括垃圾回收、JIT 和内存设置。能够降低调优中的试错成本，加速性能试验。

items.title_en: Identify a London Underground Line just by listening to it
items.title_zh: 仅凭声音识别伦敦地铁线路
items.summary_en: An interactive project challenges you to identify which London Underground line is playing by the sonic cues alone. It showcases how brand­ing and infrastructure acoustics encode identity, offering a playful angle on urban sound design.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动项目让玩家仅凭声音线索识别所播放的伦敦地铁线路，展示声音标识和基础设施声学如何编码城市身份，并带来关于城市声音设计的趣味视角。

items.title_en: BunnyCDN has been silently losing our production files for 15 months
items.title_zh: BunnyCDN 已悄悄在过去 15 个月中丢失生产文件
items.summary_en: A long-running data-loss incident at BunnyCDN leaves customer production files missing for over a year, highlighting data-loss risk and the need for robust backups and transparency. The episode underscores the fragility of relying on third-party providers for critical data and the importance of incident transparency.
items.summary_zh: BunnyCDN 长期数据丢失事件导致客户的生产文件在一年多的时间里丢失，暴露出数据丢失风险以及对稳健备份和透明度的需求。此事凸显依赖第三方存储对运营数据的潜在脆弱性，以及对事件透明度的迫切需要。

items.title_en: Kagi Product Tips – Customize Your Search Results with URL Redirects
items.title_zh: Kagi 产品技巧——通过 URL 重定向自定义搜索结果
items.summary_en: Kagi shows how to tailor search results by using URL redirects, letting you steer queries to specific endpoints or domains. The approach enables targeted results, experiments, and domain-specific workflows.
items.summary_zh: Kagi 公布如何通过 URL 重定向定制搜索结果，让你将查询导向特定端点或域名，实现更精准的结果呈现。

items.title_en: The Closing of the Frontier
items.title_zh: 前沿的收束：创新边界正在收缩
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the era of easy, open-ended frontier exploration is ending as regulatory, geopolitical, and funding constraints tighten the boundaries. It discusses how this shift will reshape risk-taking, investment, and innovation strategies.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为，随着监管、地缘政治和资金约束加剧，曾经容易探索的前沿正在收缩。此变动将改变风险偏好、投资方向及创新策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oberon System 3 runs natively on Raspberry Pi 3 (with ready SD card)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Oberon System 3 可原生在 Raspberry Pi 3 上运行（含现成 SD 卡）
items.summary_en: A demo shows Oberon System 3 running natively on Raspberry Pi 3, accompanied by a ready-to-use SD card image. It demonstrates how a compact, single-tasking OS can still be useful for education and experimentation on modern SBCs.
items.summary_zh: 演示展示 Oberon System 3 在 Raspberry Pi 3 上原生运行，并提供现成的 SD 卡镜像。此举显示了简约、单任务操作系统在现代单板计算机上的教育与试验潜力。

items.title_en: Iran demands Bitcoin fees for ships passing Hormuz during ceasefire
items.title_zh: 伊朗在停火期间要求通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只以比特币支付通行费
items.summary_en: Iran reportedly demands payments in Bitcoin for ships transiting Hormuz during a ceasefire, highlighting how states may experiment with crypto-enabled sanctions management. The move would complicate sanctions enforcement and reveal crypto as a potential tool for circumventing traditional financial channels. It raises questions about how policymakers monitor and regulate crypto in high-stakes geopolitical contexts.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，伊朗在停火期间要求通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只以比特币支付通行费，显示出国家层面在制裁合规中的新探索。若属实，这将增加对传统金融体系的依赖被绕开的风險，也引发对加密货币跨境支付与监管的关注。

items.title_en: AI Will Be Met with Violence, and Nothing Good Will Come of It
items.title_zh: AI 将遭遇暴力对待，且结果不会好
items.summary_en: An opinion argues that attempts to regulate or deploy AI will provoke violence or backlash, warning against simplistic technocratic approaches. It calls for thoughtful governance, ethical considerations, and inclusive design to avert harm.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为对 AI 的监管与部署可能招致暴力反应和社会抵抗，警惕单一技术治理路径。呼吁在治理、伦理与包容性设计层面综合施策以避免负面后果。

items.title_en: Your File System Is Already A Graph Database
items.title_zh: 你的文件系统其实已经是一个图数据库
items.summary_en: The piece argues that a filesystem naturally forms a graph, with folders, files, symlinks, and metadata creating nodes and edges. Viewing FS through a graph lens suggests new data-querying approaches directly on storage.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出文件系统本质上就是一个图，目录、文件、符号链接与元数据共同构成节点和边。用图数据库思维去查询文件系统，可能带来对存储中关系的新洞察。

items.title_en: How Complex is my Code?
items.title_zh: 我的代码有多复杂？
items.summary_en: The author surveys how to quantify code complexity and why it matters for maintainability and bugs. It covers metrics like cyclomatic and cognitive complexity, and offers pragmatic steps to simplify APIs, modularize code, and improve readability.
items.summary_zh: 文章讨论如何量化代码复杂度及其对维护性和缺陷风险的重要性。介绍常用度量如圈复杂度和认知复杂度，并给出简化接口、模块化和提升可读性等切实可行的改进建议。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (April 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在做什么？（2026 年 4 月）
items.summary_en: Developers share a mix of side projects, product experiments, and work-in-progress ideas, reflecting current tech interests. Topics span AI tooling, cloud infrastructure, and deployment hurdles, offering a barometer of what a tech audience is tinkering with in April 2026.
items.summary_zh: 开发者分享本月正在做的项目、产品实验和在研点子，揭示当前的技术趋势。话题涵盖 AI 工具、云基础设施与部署挑战，为技术人群在 2026 年 4 月的热议方向提供风向标。

items.title_en: Claude Managed Agents
items.title_zh: Claude 管理型代理
items.summary_en: Claude introduces Managed Agents, a feature that lets the AI orchestrate multiple tools and tasks autonomously with safety guardrails. This enables more complex, end-to-end workflows without constant human nudges, raising benefits for automation but also challenges around reliability, safety, and governance.
items.summary_zh: Claude 推出管理型代理功能，允许 AI 在受控条件下自动编排多种工具与任务。该特性可实现更复杂的端到端自动化，提升生产力，同时也带来可靠性、安全性与治理方面的挑战。

items.title_en: How Passive Radar Works
items.title_zh: 被动雷达的工作原理
items.summary_en: Explains how passive radar uses existing transmissions as illumination sources to detect objects without its own transmitter. By analyzing timing and Doppler shifts in reflections, passive radar enables stealthy or civilian surveillance but trades off resolution and clutter rejection.
items.summary_zh: 介绍被动雷达如何利用现有的传输信号作为照射源，在不自建发射的情况下探测目标。通过分析反射的到达时间与多普勒变化，被动雷达具有隐蔽性与较低成本的优势，但在分辨率与对杂波的处理上存在权衡。

items.title_en: Reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection
items.title_zh: 逆向工程 Gemini 的 SynthID 检测
items.summary_en: Reverse engineering Gemini's SynthID detection reveals what the system checks to verify authenticity, highlighting the fragility and design trade-offs of hardware-backed identity. The write-up underscores challenges in reliably detecting synthetic IDs and what this implies for future security tooling.
items.summary_zh: 对 Gemini 的 SynthID 检测进行逆向工程，揭示系统为验证真实身份而检查的要点，凸显硬件背书身份的脆弱性与设计权衡。该工作强调在可靠检测合成身份方面的挑战，以及对未来安全工具的启示。

items.title_en: Building a SaaS in 2026 Using Only EU Infrastructure
items.title_zh: 在 2026 年仅使用欧盟基础设施构建 SaaS
items.summary_en: The guide argues you can build a compliant, data-sovereign SaaS using EU-hosted services and cloud providers, focusing on data residency, privacy, and regulatory alignment. It discusses tradeoffs, vendor lock-in, and building with European tooling to avoid cross-border risks.
items.summary_zh: 文章建议在 2026 年构建 SaaS 时，完全使用欧盟基础设施以确保数据主权与合规性，并讨论潜在的权衡与风险。内容覆盖数据驻留、隐私保护、供应商锁定以及以欧盟工具链为核心的架构设计。

items.title_en: Bitcoin and quantum computing
items.title_zh: 比特币与量子计算
items.summary_en: Quantum computing poses a long-term risk to Bitcoin's cryptographic foundations, since enough qubits could break current elliptic-curve signatures. The piece reviews the timeline uncertainties and the industry's push toward post-quantum or quantum-resistant schemes, plus how exchanges and wallets should plan upgrades. While not imminent, the topic underscores the need for proactive crypto hygiene and upgrade paths.
items.summary_zh: 量子计算在长期内可能威胁比特币的椭圆曲线签名等加密基础。文章回顾时间线的不确定性以及行业推动的后量子防护方案，如交易所与钱包的升级计划。尽管威胁未在眼前，但提醒用户关注安全升级和密钥规程变更的前瞻性准备。

items.title_en: Slightly safer vibecoding by adopting old hacker habits
items.title_zh: 通过采用老派黑客的做法让 vibecoding 更安全
items.summary_en: Revisits old hacker habits to make vibecoding safer.
items.summary_zh: 通过借鉴早期黑客的做法来提升 vibecoding 的安全性。

items.title_en: Solod – A subset of Go that translates to C
items.title_zh: Solod：把 Go 的子集转译成 C 的工具
items.summary_en: Solod is a subset of Go that compiles down to C, enabling tight interop and potential performance benefits without a full Go toolchain. The project aims to let developers write familiar Go-like code and target C for ecosystems where C is preferred or required.
items.summary_zh: Solod 是一种 Go 的子集，能够编译成 C，从而在无需完整 Go 工具链的情况下实现高效的互操作性。该项目让开发者用类似 Go 的语法编写代码，并以 C 作为目标，适用于需要或偏好 C 的场景。

items.title_en: Newly created Polymarket accounts win big on well-timed Iran ceasefire bets
items.title_zh: Polymarket 新账户在伊朗停火预测中大赚一笔
items.summary_en: New Polymarket accounts scored big on a precisely timed Iran ceasefire bet, underscoring how prediction markets can deliver rapid windfalls for timely bets. The story highlights liquidity, risk, and regulatory scrutiny in prediction markets.
items.summary_zh: 新创建的 Polymarket 帐户在伊朗停火预测中的时机下注获得了不小的收益，凸显预测市场对及时下注的快速回报潜力。报道也揭示了这类市场的流动性、风险及监管审查的议题。

items.title_en: Japanese, French and Omani vessels cross Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 日本、法国和阿曼的船只穿越霍尔木兹海峡
items.summary_en: Three nations conduct a joint transit through the Strait of Hormuz, signaling ongoing commitments to navigation freedom amid regional tensions and underscoring the strait’s critical role in global energy routes.
items.summary_zh: 三国联合穿越霍尔木兹海峡，传达对航行自由的持续承诺，凸显该海峡在全球能源运输中的关键地位以及区域紧张局势下的海上安全议题。

items.title_en: Copilot is 'for entertainment purposes only', per Microsoft's terms of use
items.title_zh: Copilot 根据微软条款仅供娱乐用途
items.summary_en: Microsoft's Copilot terms explicitly restrict use to entertainment purposes. This phrasing raises questions about production reliability and encourages guardrails and human review for code and content generated by AI.
items.summary_zh: 微软对 Copilot 的条款明确规定仅供娱乐用途。这一表述引发关于生产环境中对 AI 生成代码的可靠性与安全性的疑问，并强调需要设定边界和人工审查。

items.title_en: Blackholing My Email
items.title_zh: 把我的邮箱‘黑洞化’
items.summary_en: An experiment in blackholing email to escape inbox overload and reclaim time. The post reflects on the trade offs of abandoning email for alternative communication channels.
items.summary_zh: 一次将邮箱“黑洞化”的个人实验，以逃离邮箱淹没并争取时间为目标。文章讨论放弃电子邮件、转向其他沟通方式的权衡。

items.title_en: Tell HN: OpenAI silently removed Study Mode from ChatGPT
items.title_zh: OpenAI 悄悄移除了 ChatGPT 的学习模式
items.summary_en: ChatGPT's Study Mode was quietly removed, affecting users who relied on focused, distraction-free sessions. The change highlights how feature deprecations can occur without fanfare, potentially disrupting study workflows.
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 的学习模式被悄然移除，影响依赖于专注、免打扰模式的用户。此变更显示出功能下线有时缺乏广泛公告，可能打乱学习流程。

items.title_en: I imported the full Linux kernel git history into pgit
items.title_zh: 将完整的 Linux 内核 Git 历史导入到 pgit
items.summary_en: Migrating the Linux kernel's entire Git history into pgit showcases how alternative Git tooling can speed up queries on large histories. It demonstrates practical gains in historical exploration, blame, and diffs for a massive project.
items.summary_zh: 将 Linux 内核的整个 Git 历史导入到 pgit，展示了替代型 Git 工具在大规模历史记录上提升查询效率的潜力。这个移植让对历史、 blame 与差异的探索在如此庞大项目中变得更高效。

items.title_en: Signals, the push-pull based algorithm
items.title_zh: Signals：一种基于推拉的算法
items.summary_en: Signals introduces a push-pull based algorithm aimed at streamlining data flow by coordinating producers and consumers with lightweight signals. The approach can reduce latency and contention in reactive or streaming systems. It offers a mental model and potential performance improvements for systems design.
items.summary_zh: Signals 介绍了一种基于推拉的算法，通过轻量级信号协调生产者和消费者来优化数据流，旨在降低反应式或流处理系统中的延迟和竞争。该方法提供了一个直观的设计模型，以及可能的性能改进方向。

items.title_en: Haunting Photos Show the Aftermath of the Kursk Submarine Disaster in 2000
items.title_zh: 罕见照片：2000 年库斯克潜艇灾难的后果
items.summary_en: Rare photos capture the Kursk submarine disaster aftermath and salvage work, offering a photographic window into late Cold War naval tech and tragedy.
items.summary_zh: 罕见照片记录了库斯克潜艇灾难的后果与打捞工作，为了解晚期冷战海军技术与悲剧提供了珍贵影像。

items.title_en: European AI. A playbook to own it
items.title_zh: 欧洲 AI：掌控它的行动指南
items.summary_en: Europe's playbook outlines strategies for building sovereign, ethical, and competitive AI ecosystems, balancing regulation with innovation. It emphasizes data governance, responsible AI, and regional leadership to reduce dependence on non-European tech stacks.
items.summary_zh: 这份行动指南提出在监管与创新之间取得平衡，打造主权、道德且具竞争力的欧洲 AI 生态系统。文中强调数据治理、负责任的 AI，以及提升区域领导力，以减少对非欧洲技术体系的依赖。

items.title_en: OpenClaw’s memory is unreliable, and you don’t know when it will break
items.title_zh: OpenClaw 的内存不可靠，何时会崩溃你也说不准
items.summary_en: Real-world deployment reports show OpenClaw memory is unreliable, with failures that are unpredictable and hard to diagnose. The posts emphasize the fragility of some toolchains and warn operators to expect intermittent breaks that can ripple through systems.
items.summary_zh: 多次在真实环境中的 OpenClaw 部署暴露出内存的不可靠性，故障不可预测且难以诊断。此现象凸显某些工具链的脆弱性，提醒运维要对间歇性中断保持警觉并做好鲁棒性准备。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a Cargo-like build tool for C/C++
items.title_zh: Show HN：我打造了一个类似 Cargo 的 C/C++ 构建工具
items.summary_en: Like Cargo for Rust, this tool aims to manage dependencies, build pipelines, and reproducible builds for C/C++. It could streamline large C/C++ projects, improve determinism, caching, and cross-language interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 此工具模仿 Rust 的 Cargo，尝试为 C/C++ 项目管理依赖、构建流水线与可重复构建。它可能简化大规模项目的依赖与缓存管理，并提升跨语言生态的互操作性与可重复性。

items.title_en: A macOS bug that causes TCP networking to stop working after 49.7 days
items.title_zh: macOS 的一个 bug：TCP 在约 49.7 天后网络停止工作
items.summary_en: A macOS networking bug causes TCP connections to fail after about 49.7 days of uptime, affecting long-running services and VPNs. The issue highlights the fragility of long-duration network stacks and could spur patching, with implications for stability in servers and enterprise deployments. Workarounds or kernel updates are likely in future releases.
items.summary_zh: 一个 macOS 网络问题在大约 49.7 天运行后会导致 TCP 连接失败，影响长期运行的服务与 VPN。这暴露了长时运行网络栈的脆弱性，可能推动补丁与更新以提升系统稳定性，尤其对服务器和企业部署影响显著。未来版本可能提供修复或临时解决方案。

items.title_en: Friendica – A Decentralized Social Network
items.title_zh: Friendica —— 一个去中心化的社交网络
items.summary_en: Friendica is a decentralized social network focused on privacy and federation across multiple protocols. It offers a community-driven alternative to centralized platforms, with interop options that appeal to users wary of data silos. The project emphasizes openness, moderation controls, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: Friendica 是一个去中心化的社交网络，强调隐私与跨协议的联邦互通。它为用户提供相对于集中的平台的社区驱动型替代方案，支持多协议的互操作性。该项目强调开放性、可控的内容监管以及跨平台互联性。

items.title_en: Polymarket gamblers betting millions on war
items.title_zh: Polymarket 赌客在战争相关事件上下注数百万
items.summary_en: Polymarket users are placing multi-million-dollar bets on war-related outcomes, drawing scrutiny from regulators and highlighting the financial appetite for real-world event prediction markets. The activity underscores both the potential of decentralized markets to price geopolitical risk and the regulatory and ethical questions they raise.
items.summary_zh: Polymarket 用户在战争相关事件上下注数百万美元，引发监管关注并暴露了对现实世界事件预测市场的资金热潮。此现象既显示了去中心化市场定价地缘政治风险的潜力，也凸显监管与伦理方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Penguin 'Toxicologists' Find PFAS Chemicals in Remote Patagonia
items.title_zh: 企鹅‘毒理学家’在偏远巴塔哥尼亚发现 PFAS 化学物质
items.summary_en: Wildlife toxicology teams found PFAS contaminants in penguins in remote Patagonia, indicating widespread environmental contamination. The finding highlights biomonitoring value and potential ecological and human health implications.
items.summary_zh: 偏远的巴塔哥尼亚地区企鹅体内发现 PFAS 材料，显示环境污染广泛存在。该发现凸显生物监测的价值，以及对生态与人类健康的潜在影响。

items.title_en: A database of analog cameras that can be 3D printed
items.title_zh: 可3D打印的胶片相机数据库
items.summary_en: An open database hosts CAD files for 3D-printable analog camera parts and bodies, enabling hobbyists to reproduce or repair vintage gear. The project democratizes access to classic photography hardware, though quality and legal considerations remain.
items.summary_zh: 一个收录可3D打印的胶片相机部件与机身的数据库，便于爱好者复制或修复复古设备。该项目让经典摄影硬件的获取更为民主，但在质量与版权方面仍需注意。

items.title_en: Clojure on Fennel Part One: Persistent Data Structures
items.title_zh: Fennel 上的 Clojure 第1部分：持久数据结构
items.summary_en: Explores implementing persistent data structures in a Clojure-on-Fennel setup, showing how to reason about immutability, sharing, and performance in a Lua-hosted Lisp environment. The post lays groundwork for building functional data structures on top of a different runtime, with potential lessons for language interop.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在 Fennel（Lua 的 Lisp 风格语言）上实现持续数据结构，并分析不可变性、数据共享与性能在这类运行时中的表现。

items.title_en: Show HN: CSS Studio. Design by hand, code by agent
items.title_zh: CSS Studio：手绘设计、代码由智能代理完成
items.summary_en: CSS Studio blends hand-drawn design with AI-assisted code generation, offering a glimpse into future frontend workflows where designers sketch visuals and agents produce the CSS.
items.summary_zh: CSS Studio 将手绘设计与AI辅助代码生成结合，揭示未来前端工作流的一个方向：设计师绘制视觉草图，代理生成 CSS 代码。

items.title_en: Understanding Traceroute
items.title_zh: 理解 traceroute 的工作原理
items.summary_en: A practical primer on how traceroute works: TTL-based probing, ICMP responses, and interpreting hop data. It also notes limitations like firewall filtering and path asymmetry that can mislead troubleshooting.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 traceroute 的工作机制：通过基于生存时间的探测、ICMP 响应以及对跳点数据的解读。也指出防火墙、路径不对称等局限，可能使故障排查出现偏差。

items.title_en: VOID: Video Object and Interaction Deletion
items.title_zh: VOID：视频对象与互动删除
items.summary_en: Netflix's VOID model enables targeted deletion of objects and interactions within videos, supporting privacy-preserving edits and safer content handling. By focusing on object-level removal, it aims to reduce re-encoding overhead and preserve remaining content.
items.summary_zh: Netflix 的 VOID 模型实现对视频中的特定对象和互动进行逐位删除，支持隐私保护的内容编辑与更安全的内容处理。通过面向对象级别的删除，旨在降低重新编码的开销，同时尽量保留其余部分。

items.title_en: Productive Procrastination
items.title_zh: 高效拖延术
items.summary_en: Productive Procrastination argues that deliberate, structured delay can yield real progress by pairing low-friction tasks with bigger goals. It offers techniques like structured procrastination, timeboxing, and prioritization to turn distraction into momentum.
items.summary_zh: 《高效拖延术》提出通过刻意、结构化的拖延来推动实际产出，将低门槛任务与更大目标绑定。文中介绍结构化拖延、时间盒管理和优先级策略等方法，将分心转化为行动的动力。

items.title_en: Show HN: FluidCAD – Parametric CAD with JavaScript
items.title_zh: Show HN：FluidCAD——基于 JavaScript 的参数化 CAD
items.summary_en: FluidCAD brings parametric CAD to the web with JavaScript, enabling models defined as code and driven by scripts. This approach enables rapid iteration, versioning, and integration with web tooling, signaling a shift toward programmable design tools for engineers and hobbyists.
items.summary_zh: FluidCAD 将参数化 CAD 带到网页上，模型以代码形式定义并可通过脚本驱动。此设计将支持快速迭代、版本管理，并更好地与网页工具链集成，体现了工程与爱好者在设计工具上的可编程化趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gemma Gem – AI model embedded in a browser – no API keys, no cloud
items.title_zh: Show HN：Gemma Gem—浏览器内置的 AI 模型——无需 API 密钥、无云端依赖
items.summary_en: Gemma Gem runs an AI model entirely in the browser with no API keys or cloud requests, emphasizing offline privacy and low-latency inference. It showcases the viability of browser-native AI and could influence privacy-focused tooling.
items.summary_zh: Gemma Gem 在浏览器中本地运行 AI 模型，无需 API 密钥或云端请求，强调离线隐私与低延迟推理。这类本地化 AI 概念可能推动隐私友好工具的发展。

items.title_en: Show HN: A cartographer's attempt to realistically map Tolkien's world
items.title_zh: 绘制托尔金世界的现实世界地图尝试
items.summary_en: A cartographer attempts to map Tolkien's world with realistic geography, aligning terrain, rivers, and distances to lore. The project shows how strict world-building can translate fantasy into data-driven maps.
items.summary_zh: 一位制图师尝试以现实地理学的方法为托尔金世界绘制地图，使地形、河流与距离与传说相符。该项目展示了如何将虚构世界以数据化方式呈现，形成可验证的地理系统。

items.title_en: A whole civilization might die tonight
items.title_zh: 今夜，整个人类文明可能灭亡
items.summary_en: The piece surveys a stark, high-stakes warning about potential conflict with Iran and the risk of escalating toward a broader catastrophe. It uses dramatic rhetoric to spotlight geopolitical tensions around Hormuz and the possible consequences for global security and tech supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 这篇报道以强烈的措辞聚焦伊朗与地区紧张局势，警示可能引发更广泛灾难的高风险情景。文章强调霍尔木兹紧张局势对全球安全、能源和科技供应链的潜在冲击。

items.title_en: A WebGPU implementation of Augmented Vertex Block Descent
items.title_zh: 基于 WebGPU 的增强顶点块下降实现
items.summary_en: Shows a WebGPU-based approach to a complex descent algorithm, illustrating how browser GPUs can power interactive physics-like simulations. The implementation highlights data flows, shader design, and performance considerations that matter for web-native simulations.
items.summary_zh: 展示了基于 WebGPU 的增强顶点块下降实现，说明浏览器 GPU 在网页仿真中的潜力。文中关注数据流、着色器设计与性能考量，对网页原生仿真开发者具有实用意义。

items.title_en: Code is run more than read (2023)
items.title_zh: 代码的运行多于阅读（2023）
items.summary_en: Developers spend more time running and testing code than reading it, according to recent reflections. The piece argues for tooling and workflows that prioritize execution, tests, and observable behavior over static code analysis, highlighting implications for education, debugging, and CI/CD.
items.summary_zh: 观点认为开发者花在运行与测试代码上的时间多于阅读代码。文章强调应优先考虑执行、测试和可观测行为的工具链与工作流，影响教育、调试与持续集成/交付等方面。

items.title_en: The Problem That Built an Industry
items.title_zh: 推动一个行业的难题（铁芯——第一部分，奠定产业的根源）
items.summary_en: Delves into the historical problem behind core memory that built the industry, outlining constraints and breakthroughs, and showing how early memory tech shaped modern hardware manufacturing and supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 回顾促成铁芯记忆等早期硬件行业诞生的历史难题，概述当年的瓶颈与突破，以及这些创新如何影响现代硬件的制造与供应链。

items.title_en: Bluesky April 2026 Outage Post-Mortem
items.title_zh: Bluesky 2026年4月故障事后分析
items.summary_en: Bluesky published an outage post-mortem covering the April 2026 incident, detailing root causes, fixes, and lessons learned. The report highlights reliability challenges in distributed social networks and practical steps to improve resilience and recoverability.
items.summary_zh: Bluesky 发布了 2026 年4月的故障事后分析，剖析原因、修复过程与经验教训。该报告凸显分布式社交网络在可靠性方面的挑战，并给出提升韧性与可恢复性的实用建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: 41 years sea surface temperature anomalies
items.title_zh: Show HN：41 年海表面温度异常数据
items.summary_en: Showcases four decades of sea surface temperature anomaly data with accessible visuals, enabling researchers and developers to explore climate trends and variability over time.
items.summary_zh: 展示四十多年海表面温度异常数据及可视化，便于研究人员与开发者研究气候趋势与变异性。

items.title_en: Binary obfuscation that doesn't kill LTO
items.title_zh: 不会破坏 LTO 的二进制混淆
items.summary_en: Describes a binary obfuscation approach that preserves Link Time Optimization, showing how security can be bolstered without sacrificing performance or compile-time benefits.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一种在不损害链接时优化（LTO）的前提下实现的二进制混淆方法，展示如何在不牺牲性能与编译时优化的情况下提升安全性。

items.title_en: Emperor penguin and Antarctic fur seal now endangered
items.title_zh: 帝企鹅和南极毛皮海豹现已濒危
items.summary_en: Climate change and warming oceans have pushed emperor penguins and Antarctic fur seals to endangered status per the IUCN. The designation underscores heightened risks to Antarctic ecosystems and highlights the urgency of conservation and climate mitigation efforts.
items.summary_zh: 气候变化与海洋变暖将帝企鹅和南极毛皮海豹推向濒危， IUCN 的最新评估显示这两者均处于高风险。此情形凸显南极生态系统所面临的日益严峻的威胁，促使加强保护与气候缓解措施。

items.title_en: Expanding Swift's IDE Support
items.title_zh: 扩展 Swift 的 IDE 支持
items.summary_en: Swift.org is broadening tooling support across IDEs to improve autocompletion, diagnostics, and integration beyond Xcode. This move lowers barriers for Swift adoption in diverse editor workflows and strengthens developer experience.
items.summary_zh: Swift.org 正在扩大对 IDE 的工具支持，提升自动完成、诊断与跨编辑器集成的体验，帮助开发者在多编辑器工作流中更高效使用 Swift。

items.title_en: Native Americans had dice 12k years ago
items.title_zh: 美洲原住民1.2万年前已有骰子
items.summary_en: Archaeologists report 12,000-year-old dice from North America, indicating that dice gaming and probabilistic thinking have deep roots on the continent. The find adds nuance to our view of prehistoric leisure and mathematics, suggesting complex social play was present far earlier than previously thought.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家发现北美地区早于一万两千年的骰子，表明该地区早在史前就有掷骰游戏和概率思维。此发现为人们对原始娱乐和数学思维的理解增添新细节，显示在此前人类社会就已进行复杂的共同游戏。

items.title_en: Session is shutting down in 90 days
items.title_zh: Session 将在90天内关闭
items.summary_en: Session will shut down in 90 days, highlighting the funding and maintenance challenges facing privacy-focused tools. The closure serves as a reminder that sustainable support is essential for open-source projects with niche value.
items.summary_zh: Session 将在 90 天后关闭，凸显隐私导向工具在长期资金与维护方面的挑战。该决定提醒人们，对特定价值的开源项目需要可持续的支持。

items.title_en: AI helps add 10k more photos to OldNYC
items.title_zh: AI 让 OldNYC 增添一万张照片
items.summary_en: AI augmentation adds about 10,000 new photos to OldNYC, expanding the historical record of New York through computer vision and data curation. The update enhances accessibility for researchers and hobbyists exploring urban change.
items.summary_zh: 通过 AI 增强，OldNYC 增添约1万张新照片，扩充纽约市历史记录。此更新提升了研究者与爱好者在研究城市变迁时的可访问性。

items.title_en: Xilem – An experimental Rust native UI framework
items.title_zh: Xilem：一个实验性的 Rust 原生 UI 框架
items.summary_en: Xilem is an experimental Rust-native UI framework targeting high performance and clean abstractions with native widgets and minimal runtime overhead. It appeals to developers seeking efficient, low-level UI tech in Rust.
items.summary_zh: Xilem 是一个实验性的 Rust 原生 UI 框架，致力于提供高性能、简洁的抽象和原生控件。项目强调最小运行时开销和跨平台潜力，吸引对本地界面开发感兴趣的开发者。

items.title_en: Bevy game development tutorials and in-depth resources
items.title_zh: Bevy 游戏开发教程与深入资源
items.summary_en: Bevy tutorials and resources provide a structured entry into Rust-based game development, covering ECS architecture, rendering, and tooling. The collection helps both beginners and seasoned developers level up with practical guides and deep-dive materials.
items.summary_zh: Bevy 的游戏开发教程与深度资料为 Rust 游戏开发者提供系统化学习路径，涵盖 ECS 架构、渲染和工具链等要点，适合初学者与有经验者深入学习。

items.title_en: Drop, formerly Massdrop, ends most collaborations and rebrands under Corsair
items.title_zh: Drop：前 Massdrop 终止大部分合作并以 Corsair 名义重塑
items.summary_en: Drop, formerly Massdrop, is ending many collaborations and rebranding under Corsair. The move signals a strategic consolidation around core gaming peripherals and community-driven products, affecting creators and fans who followed limited releases.
items.summary_zh: Drop（前身 Massdrop）终止多数合作并以 Corsair 名义重新定位。此举标志着向核心游戏外设与社区驱动产品的策略整合，对曾关注限量商品的创作者与粉丝将产生影响。

items.title_en: The team behind a pro-Iran, Lego-themed viral-video campaign
items.title_zh: 背后团队推动的亲伊朗、乐高风格的病毒式视频
items.summary_en: A pro-Iran Lego-themed viral video campaign reveals how lightweight, playful content can go viral in geopolitics, bypassing gatekeepers and shaping perceptions.
items.summary_zh: 一支亲伊朗、乐高风格的病毒式视频背后，展示了轻量、趣味内容在地缘政治环境中的快速传播，以及对舆论的影响力。报道揭示了虚假信息、平台治理以及数字劝导工具箱正在演化的挑战。

items.title_en: CPU-Z and HWMonitor compromised
items.title_zh: CPU-Z 与 HWMonitor 被入侵
items.summary_en: Two popular hardware monitoring tools were compromised, likely via bundled installers or supply-chain attack, risking user systems. The incident underscores the importance of provenance checks, software signing, and consumer caution when downloading tools that access low-level hardware data.
items.summary_zh: 两款流行的硬件监控工具遭到入侵，可能通过捆绑安装包或供应链攻击实现，威胁到用户系统安全。此事件强调追踪来源、软件签名和下载此类访问硬件底层信息工具的谨慎性。

items.title_en: Hegel, a universal property-based testing protocol and family of PBT libraries
items.title_zh: Hegel：一种通用属性测试协议及其 PBT 库家族
items.summary_en: Hegel proposes a universal protocol for property-based testing to standardize how tests describe properties and shrink results across languages, enabling reusable test strategies. The ecosystem includes a family of libraries implementing the protocol, improving cross-language testing and test-case generation.
items.summary_zh: Hegel 提出一种通用的属性基测试协议，旨在跨语言标准化如何描述属性并收敛测试用例。相关生态包括若干实现该协议的 PBT 库，提升跨语言测试的一致性与用例生成效率。

items.title_en: Tech valuations are back to pre-AI boom levels
items.title_zh: 科技估值回到AI繁荣前的水平
items.summary_en: Tech valuations have fallen back to pre-AI-boom levels, signaling a normalization of investor sentiment after AI hype. The reset may separate hype from fundamentals, presenting risks and opportunities for investors.
items.summary_zh: 科技公司的估值已回落至AI繁荣前的水平，显示在AI 热潮之后投资者情绪回归理性。估值的回落可能将热度与基本面区分开来，给投资者带来潜在的机会与风险。

items.title_en: Internet outage in Iran reaches 1,008 hours
items.title_zh: 伊朗互联网中断达 1008 小时
items.summary_en: Iran experienced a prolonged internet outage exceeding 1,000 hours, affecting economy, communications, and access to information. The outage underscores how dependency on connectivity shapes daily life and highlights resilience challenges.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗互联网中断持续超过1000小时，严重影响经济、通讯与信息获取。此事凸显网络连通性对日常生活的重要性以及应对持续性中断的挑战。

items.title_en: The Physics of GPS
items.title_zh: GPS 的物理原理
items.summary_en: Explains how GPS works, including relativistic corrections and signal timing, and shows how geometry and timing enable precise positioning.
items.summary_zh: 详细解释 GPS 的工作原理，涵盖相对论修正、信号时序，以及几何与时钟同步如何实现高精度定位。

items.title_en: How to build a `Git diff` driver
items.title_zh: 如何构建一个 Git diff 驱动
items.summary_en: Provides a guide to register and implement a custom Git diff driver, enabling specialized comparisons for particular file types. Covers configuration steps, practical use cases, and integration caveats with existing workflows.
items.summary_zh: 给出注册并实现自定义 Git diff 驱动的指南，使对特定文件类型能够进行定制化比较。介绍配置步骤、实际使用场景，以及与现有工作流的整合注意事项。

items.title_en: Tofolli gates are all you need
items.title_zh: Toffoli 门才是你需要的全部
items.summary_en: Toffoli gates show that a single gate family is enough to implement any computation when combined with negation, illustrating the elegance of universal gate sets in reversible and quantum circuits.
items.summary_zh: 本文主张，在只用 Toffoli 门且可与简单取反结合的前提下，任何计算都可以实现，揭示了可逆与量子电路中统一门集的强大魅力。它还讨论了在硬件实现和教学中的实际意义。

items.title_en: Dr. Dobb's Developer Library DVD 6 (2010)
items.title_zh: Dr. Dobb's 开发者图书馆 DVD 6
items.summary_en: Dr. Dobb's Developer Library DVD 6 compiles vintage programming resources, including code samples, tutorials, and tools from a bygone era. It serves as a historical snapshot of how developers learned and shared knowledge before the web era, offering both nostalgia and practical insights for retro computing fans. The collection can inspire modern learners to appreciate enduring programming patterns.
items.summary_zh: Dr. Dobb's 开发者图书馆 DVD 6 汇集了一批老派的编程资源，包括代码示例、教程与工具，代表一个已逝时代的学习方式。它是开发者如何在网络兴起前获取知识的历史写照，既有怀旧价值，也提供对复古计算的实用见解。该合集可能激发现代开发者对常用编程模式的重新认识。

items.title_en: A Tour of Oodi
items.title_zh: Oodi 图书馆之旅
items.summary_en: A tour of Oodi, Helsinki's flagship library, highlighting architecture, flexible spaces, and public services enabled by modern design. The piece offers takeaways on how libraries combine culture with digital infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 文章带你走访赫尔辛基 Oodi 图书馆，聚焦建筑风格、灵活公共空间以及现代设计支持的数字化服务。展示图书馆如何在文化与数字基础设施之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: Supply chain nightmare: How Rust will be attacked and what we can do to mitigate
items.title_zh: Rust 供应链噩梦：将如何被攻击及应对办法
items.summary_en: An analysis of Rust's supply chain risks, including crates.io vulnerabilities, dependency confusion, and malicious crates. The piece outlines mitigation strategies: strict lockfiles, reproducible builds, code signing, and vendor-backed crates. It emphasizes need for ecosystem-wide security practices as Rust grows.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨 Rust 生态的供应链风险，包括 crates.io 漏洞、依赖混淆和恶意 crate。提出的缓释策略包括使用严格的锁定文件、可重复构建、代码签名，以及对关键 crate 的自有代理，强调在 Rust 生态日益壮大的背景下需要全面的安全实践。

items.title_en: Creating the Futurescape for the Fifth Element (2019)
items.title_zh: 为《第五元素》构建未来景观（2019）
items.summary_en: Describes how the Fifth Element's futuristic world was imagined for a 2019 retrospective, blending design, practical effects, and art direction to convey a vivid sci-fi futurism.
items.summary_zh: 解读《第五元素》在 2019 年回顾中的未来景观设计，展示美术、特效与美术指导如何共同塑造生动的科幻未来感。

items.title_en: All elementary functions from a single binary operator
items.title_zh: 用单一二元运算生成所有初等函数
items.summary_en: Proves that a single binary operator can generate all elementary functions, revealing a surprisingly small algebraic basis for calculus. The result has implications for symbolic computation, functional programming, and universal function representations.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，通过一个二元运算即可构造所有初等函数，揭示了微积分的极简代数基础。这一发现可能影响符号计算、函数式编程以及统一表示函数的方法。

items.title_en: What is RISC-V and why it matters to Canonical
items.title_zh: 什么是 RISC-V，以及它对 Canonical 的意义
items.summary_en: Canonical's Ubuntu ecosystem is examining RISC-V, the open instruction set architecture that promotes customization and openness. The move signals growing interest in open hardware for cloud, edge, and embedded workloads.
items.summary_zh: Canonical 的 Ubuntu 生态正在探索 RISC-V 开放指令集，强调开放硬件的潜力与定制能力。此举体现业界在云、边缘和嵌入式场景对可控架构的关注。

items.title_en: Scientists Figured Out How Eels Reproduce (2022)
items.title_zh: 科学家终于揭示鳗鱼繁殖方式（2022）
items.summary_en: Scientists reveal how eels reproduce, solving a long-standing biological mystery. The findings describe spawning in the wild lifecycle and lifecycle steps, contributing to fisheries management and evolutionary biology.
items.summary_zh: 科学家揭示了鳗鱼的繁殖方式，解决长期的生物学之谜，阐明了它们的繁殖与迁徙模式。研究表明鳗鱼在深海产卵的生命周期，相关发现有助于保护、养殖与生物学研究。

items.title_en: Teardown of unreleased LG Rollable shows why rollable phones aren't a thing
items.title_zh: 未发布的LG可卷曲手机拆解：为何可卷曲手机难成气候
items.summary_en: A teardown of an unreleased LG rollable phone reveals mechanical complexity, reliability concerns, and cost drivers that hinder mainstream adoption. The insights explain why rollables haven't yet taken off in the market.
items.summary_zh: 对未发布的LG可卷曲手机进行拆解，显示出机械复杂性、可靠性风险与高成本等因素，解释了为何这类设备还未走向主流。

items.title_en: The Bra-and-Girdle Maker That Fashioned the Impossible for NASA
items.title_zh: 为 NASA 打造不可能的胸衣设计者
items.summary_en: A profile of a designer who created undergarment solutions that helped NASA push the boundaries of fit and comfort in extreme environments.
items.summary_zh: 讲述一位设计师通过开发独特的胸衣与紧身衣解决方案，帮助 NASA 在极端环境中实现更高的贴合与舒适度。揭示太空任务背后被忽视的实用工程与跨学科创新。

items.title_en: John Coltrane illustrates the mathematics of jazz
items.title_zh: 约翰·科尔特兰：揭示爵士的数学
items.summary_en: John Coltrane's improvisational approach is framed as a mathematical system, offering a lens into the structures behind jazz harmony and rhythm. The piece connects music theory, data visualization, and performance practice to illuminate creativity.
items.summary_zh: 把约翰·科尔特兰的即兴演奏视为一种数学体系，揭示爵士乐和声与节奏背后的结构。这一视角将音乐理论、数据可视化与演奏实践结合，展示创造力的深层机制。

items.title_en: Italo Calvino: A traveller in a world of uncertainty
items.title_zh: 伊塔洛·卡尔维诺：不确定世界中的旅行者
items.summary_en: An exploration of Italo Calvino's approach to uncertainty in his writing, using travel as a metaphor for navigating unclear futures. The piece draws insights for modern tech thinkers about embracing ambiguity, flexible systems, and imaginative thinking.
items.summary_zh: 本文解读意大利作家伊塔洛·卡尔维诺在作品中对“不确定性”的处理，以旅行者隐喻应对未来的不确定。为现代技术工作者提供拥抱模糊性、追求灵活系统和富有想象力思维的启示。

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫人员被告知不要在预测市场下注
items.summary_en: White House staff have been instructed not to place bets on prediction markets, citing conflict-of-interest concerns and ethical guidelines. The move highlights how government forecasting tools intersect with policy integrity.
items.summary_zh: 白宫工作人员被指示不要在预测市场下注，理由是利益冲突与伦理考量。这一举动凸显政府在使用预测市场进行决策时需要维护公正性。

items.title_en: A whole boss fight in 256 bytes
items.title_zh: 用 256 字节实现完整 Boss 战
items.summary_en: A code-golf style achievement compressing a complete boss fight into just 256 bytes. It showcases extreme minification techniques and how careful data representation and control flow can fit a full game inside a tiny footprint.
items.summary_zh: 一项极致代码高尔夫的成就：用仅 256 字节实现一个完整的 Boss 战。展示了极致压缩技法，以及通过精简数据结构和控制流在极小的体积内表达完整游戏的可能性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Marimo pair – Reactive Python notebooks as environments for agents
items.title_zh: Marimo Pair：用于代理的响应式 Python 笔记本环境
items.summary_en: Marimo Pair provides a reactive Python notebook setup tailored for building and testing AI agents, enabling real-time feedback loops between code, data, and environments. It accelerates iteration for agent development.
items.summary_zh: Marimo Pair 提供面向代理的响应式 Python 笔记本环境，支持代码、数据和环境之间的实时反馈回路，提升代理开发的迭代效率。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hippo, biologically inspired memory for AI agents
items.title_zh: Show HN：Hippo——生物启发的AI代理记忆
items.summary_en: Hippo proposes memory structures for AI agents inspired by biological systems, aiming to improve long-horizon reasoning and continual learning. By borrowing from how real brains store and retrieve information, it may offer more scalable and robust agent cognition. If you're building persistent, capable agents, this approach is worth tracking.
items.summary_zh: Hippo 提出受生物系统启发的 AI 代理记忆结构，目标是提升长期推理和持续学习的能力。借鉴真实大脑的信息存储与检索机制，或许能带来更可扩展、更稳健的代理认知。若在构建具持久能力的智能代理，值得关注。

items.title_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: Part 3 – Culture
items.title_zh: 万物的未来都是谎言，我猜：第3部分——文化
items.summary_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: Part 3 – Culture argues that cultural narratives shape our tech futures, exploring how myths and social dynamics influence what technologies get built and adopted.
items.summary_zh: 《万物的未来都是谎言，我猜》第三部分聚焦文化，探讨叙事如何塑造技术的未来，以及社会动力在技术选择与採用中的作用。

items.title_en: Will I ever own a zettaflop?
items.title_zh: 我会拥有泽塔级运算力吗？
items.summary_en: Explores the feasibility, cost, and implications of reaching zettaflop-scale computing beyond exascale milestones.
items.summary_zh: 探讨达到泽塔级运算力的可行性、成本与意义。分析这类规模的计算对 AI 工作负载的潜在影响，以及硬件、软件和能源等方面的挑战。

items.title_en: The Raft consensus algorithm explained through "Mean Girls" (2019)
items.title_zh: Raft 共识算法：通过《Mean Girls》讲解
items.summary_en: An accessible, entertaining explanation of the Raft consensus algorithm using clips from Mean Girls; it clarifies concepts like leader election, consensus safety, and liveness with tangible analogies. The piece helps engineers grasp how Raft ensures reliability in distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 通过《Mean Girls》中的情节，为 Raft 共识算法提供直观解释，用可感的比喻解释领导者选举、共识安全与活性等要点。帮助读者理解 Raft 如何在分布式系统中保障可靠性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Orange Juice – Small UX improvements that make HN easier to read
items.title_zh: Show HN：Orange Juice——让 Hacker News 更易读的小型 UX 改进
items.summary_en: Showcases a set of lightweight UI tweaks that make Hacker News easier to read, reducing clutter and improving typography. The project demonstrates how small, thoughtful design changes can meaningfully improve readability on a text-heavy site.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一组轻量级的用户界面改动，帮助提升 Hacker News 的可读性，减少冗余并优化排版。该项目证明在文本密集的站点上，细致的设计调整也能带来显著的可读性提升。

items.title_en: Case study: recovery of a corrupted 12 TB multi-device pool
items.title_zh: 案例研究：从损坏的 12 TB 多设备池中恢复数据
items.summary_en: A case study on recovering a corrupted 12 TB multi-device pool details salvage steps, including data recovery, metadata repair, and minimizing further damage. It underscores the importance of backups and careful recovery procedures for multi-disk arrays. Practical guidance for disaster recovery and data integrity.
items.summary_zh: 案例研究记录了从损坏的 12 TB 多设备池中恢复数据的过程，涵盖数据挽救、元数据修复及降低进一步损坏的做法。强调了备份与谨慎恢复在多盘阵列中的重要性，为灾难恢复与数据完整性提供实用要点。

items.title_en: Has electricity decoupled from natural gas prices in Germany?
items.title_zh: 德国电价是否已脱离天然气价格？
items.summary_en: It investigates whether German electricity prices have decoupled from natural gas prices, with results suggesting a growing separation driven by renewables and structural market reforms. The finding has implications for consumer bills, energy policy, and hedging strategies.
items.summary_zh: 分析显示，德国电价可能正逐步与天然气价格脱钩，这与可再生能源扩大、市场改革等因素有关。此现象对家庭电费、能源政策及对冲策略具有重要影响。

items.title_en: Watgo – A WebAssembly Toolkit for Go
items.title_zh: Watgo：Go 的 WebAssembly 工具链
items.summary_en: Watgo provides a WebAssembly toolkit for Go, enabling Go programs to compile to Wasm and interoperate with JavaScript or host environments. The project illustrates the growing use of WASM for cross-language portability and edge computing, making Go usable in browser-like or sandboxed runtimes.
items.summary_zh: Watgo 为 Go 提供 WebAssembly 工具链，使 Go 程序能够编译为 Wasm，并在与 JavaScript/宿主环境的协作中运行。该项目体现了 WASM 在跨语言移植和边缘计算场景的日益重要性，让 Go 在浏览器或沙箱运行时具备更广的应用。

items.title_en: Three hundred synths, 3 hardware projects, and one app
items.title_zh: 三百台合成器、三个硬件项目与一个应用
items.summary_en: An ambitious exploration of hundreds of synthesizers, three hardware builds, and a unifying app, illustrating how diverse gear and software can be wired into cohesive musical workflows. The piece offers takeaways on interoperability, creative constraints, and rapid prototyping for makers and musicians.
items.summary_zh: 此项目汇集了海量合成器的探索、三个硬件搭建与一个统一应用，展示了多种设备和软件如何协同工作，形成连贯的创作流程。文中对互操作性、创意约束与快速原型设计给出可借鉴之处，适合发烧友与音乐人。

items.title_en: An Interview with Pat Gelsinger
items.title_zh: 帕特·盖尔辛格访谈
items.summary_en: Pat Gelsinger shares Intel's strategic outlook on AI workloads, manufacturing, and IDM 2.0, providing candid perspectives on the road ahead for semiconductors. The interview sheds light on how Intel plans to compete in a rapidly evolving chip ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 帕特·盖尔辛格在访谈中谈及英特尔在 AI 工作负载、制造业和 IDM 2.0 的战略展望，提供对半导体行业快速演变格局的直观洞见。

items.title_en: One ant for $220: The new frontier of wildlife trafficking
items.title_zh: 一只蚂蚁卖 220 美元：野生动物走私的新前线
items.summary_en: An investigative piece reveals how a single ant can fetch hundreds of dollars, signaling a growing niche in wildlife trafficking. It discusses supply chains, enforcement challenges, and biodiversity risks as demand for rare insects rises. The takeaway is a warning about how niche trades complicate protection efforts.
items.summary_zh: 一篇调查揭示，一只蚂蚁竟能卖到约 220 美元，显示野生动物走私正在出现新的细分市场。文中探讨了供给链、执法挑战以及对生物多样性的威胁，随着对稀有昆虫的需求增加，执法难度也在上升。

items.title_en: One item purchased, ten emails
items.title_zh: 买一个物品却收到十封邮件
items.summary_en: Describes the flood of post-purchase emails after a single order, highlighting notification fatigue in e-commerce. The piece argues for more respectful, user-controlled communication and smarter messaging strategies.
items.summary_zh: 描述单次购买后收到大量后续邮件的现象，突出电商通知信息的疲劳感。文章主张更尊重用户、可控的沟通方式和更聪明的消息策略。

items.title_en: Taking on CUDA with ROCm: 'One Step After Another'
items.title_zh: 以 ROCm 逐步挑战 CUDA
items.summary_en: AMD's ROCm roadmap aims to compete with CUDA through incremental improvements, focusing on portability, kernel compilation, and performance optimizations. The approach underscores the difficulty of breaking NVIDIA's software moat and the need for strong open standards in GPU computing.
items.summary_zh: AMD 的 ROCm 计划通过渐进改进与 CUDA 竞争，聚焦可移植性、内核编译与性能优化。该策略凸显打破 NVIDIA 软件生态护城河的难度，同时也强调在 GPU 计算领域坚持开源标准的重要性。

items.title_en: Doom, Played over Curl
items.title_zh: Curl 上的 Doom：用 Curl 玩 Doom
items.summary_en: A playful project runs Doom using curl-based tooling, demonstrating creative use of everyday CLI utilities as a game-like experience. It showcases how far developers can push tooling boundaries and what counts as interactive programming.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的项目用 curl 构建的工作流来运行 Doom，展示了用常见 CLI 工具打造游戏体验的创造力与边界扩展。

items.title_en: Six (and a half) intuitions for KL divergence
items.title_zh: KL 散度的六个半直觉
items.summary_en: Presents six core intuitions about KL divergence (plus a half), clarifying how it measures distribution mismatch, asymmetry, and data-efficiency in learning. The notes help practitioners reason about when KL-based objectives help or hurt model training.
items.summary_zh: 给出关于 KL 散度的六个核心直觉（再加半个），阐明其如何衡量分布差异、非对称性和学习中的数据效率。笔记帮助从业者判断在模型训练中何时使用 KL 目标有益、何时可能带来负面影响。

items.title_en: Number in man page titles e.g. sleep(3)
items.title_zh: 手册页标题中的数字，例如 sleep(3)
items.summary_en: Why do man pages include the section number? Sleep(3) is not a version but a section in the Unix manual; the post explains practical tips for navigating and citing manual entries. It’s a concise reminder for developers and sysadmins to be precise when consulting docs.
items.summary_zh: 为何手册页要标注数字？sleep(3) 不是版本号，而是 Unix 手册中的一个章节。文中给出在查阅和引用文档时的实用技巧，提醒开发者和系统管理员要保持引用的准确性。

items.title_en: Mysteries of Dropbox: Testing of a Distributed Sync Service (2016) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Dropbox 的谜团：分布式同步服务的属性测试
items.summary_en: Property-based testing is applied to scale-tested distributed sync in Dropbox, probing invariants under network delays and partial failures. The work highlights how such techniques expose edge-case bugs that traditional tests miss and suggests practical testing strategies for complex distributed systems.
items.summary_zh: 将属性测试应用到 Dropbox 的分布式同步系统，检验在网络延迟和部分故障下的系统不变量。此研究揭示传统测试容易漏检的边缘情况，并提出提升分布式系统健壮性的实用测试方法。

items.title_en: Moving fast in hardware: lessons from lab to $100M ARR
items.title_zh: 硬件领域快速推进：从实验室到亿美元 ARR 的教训
items.summary_en: A hardware founder shares lessons on shipping fast without sacrificing reliability, emphasizing the need to simplify designs, iterate rapidly, and align product-market fit with scalable manufacturing. The trajectory from lab prototyping to a hundred-million ARR underscores discipline in execution.
items.summary_zh: 一位硬件创始人分享如何在不牺牲可靠性的前提下快速出货，强调简化设计、快速迭代以及与可扩展生产的市场契合。该从实验室原型到亿美元级年收入的路径，体现的是执行中的自律。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claudraband – Claude Code for the Power User
items.title_zh: Show HN：Claudraband——面向高级用户的 Claude 编码工具
items.summary_en: Show HN about Claudraband, a project enabling advanced users to leverage Claude's coding capabilities; features may include faster prompts, templates, or CLI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claudraband 是一个让高级用户更高效利用 Claude 的编码工具集，提供改进的界面或工作流以加速编码、测试与部署。面向 power users 的能力扩展体现了对大语言模型在专业场景中可用性的追求。

items.title_en: Second Revision of 6502 Laptop
items.title_zh: 6502 笔记本的第二次改版
items.summary_en: Second revision of a 6502 based laptop shows improvements to power, cooling, and usability while preserving retro hardware charm.
items.summary_zh: 6502 笔记本的第二次改版在电源、散热与易用性方面取得改进，同时保留了复古硬件的魅力。

items.title_en: Show HN: We built a camera only robot vacuum for less than 300$ (Well almost)
items.title_zh: 我们用摄像头打造的机器人吸尘器，价格不足300美元（几乎）
items.summary_en: A camera-only robot vacuum prototype demonstrates a low-cost autonomous cleaner under $300. While-costs are appealing, navigation and mapping trade-offs highlight practical limits of camera-only autonomy.
items.summary_zh: 一个仅用摄像头的机器人吸尘器原型，成本声称低于300美元。尽管成本具吸引力，但导航与地图构建等方面的取舍也显现出摄像头单一方案的现实局限。

items.title_en: The Zettelkasten method in Obsidian
items.title_zh: Obsidian 中的 Zettelkasten 笔记法
items.summary_en: Shows how to implement the Zettelkasten note-taking method inside Obsidian, with workflow tips, linking strategies, and plugin recommendations to build a robust knowledge system.
items.summary_zh: 展示如何在 Obsidian 中实现 Zettelkasten 笔记法，包含工作流要点、链接策略以及插件推荐，帮助搭建稳健的知识体系。

items.title_en: Tree Calculus
items.title_zh: 树计算
items.summary_en: Introduces Tree Calculus, a framework for reasoning about tree-structured data and algorithms, with potential applications in compilers, data processing, and functional programming.
items.summary_zh: 介绍树计算这一用于对树状数据结构及相关算法进行推理的框架，潜在应用覆盖编译器、数据处理与函数式编程等领域。

items.title_en: HBO Obtains DMCA Subpoena to Unmask 'Euphoria' Spoiler Account on X
items.title_zh: HBO 获得 DMCA 传票，揭露 X 上的 Euphoria 剧透账号
items.summary_en: HBO obtained a DMCA subpoena to unmask a spoiler account on X tied to Euphoria, illustrating enforcement actions against platform-based spoilers and the broader tension between copyright policing and free expression. The case highlights how legal tools intersect with social media moderation.
items.summary_zh: HBO 取得 DMCA 传票以揭露 X 上的 Euphoria 剧透账号，体现版权执法与社媒平台内容监管的边界与挑战。

items.title_en: Usenet Archives
items.title_zh: Usenet 档案馆
items.summary_en: Usenet Archives curates and preserves historical Usenet posts, creating a searchable repository for researchers, developers, and curious readers. It highlights the enduring value of early internet discussions and the importance of long-term digital preservation.
items.summary_zh: Usenet Archives 汇集并保存了历史性的 Usenet 帖子，提供可检索的资料库供研究者、开发者和好奇读者使用。它强调早期互联网讨论的持久价值以及数字长期保存的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Anos – a hand-written ~100KiB microkernel for x86-64 and RISC-V
items.title_zh: Show HN：Anos——一个手写的 ~100KiB 的微内核，支持 x86-64 与 RISC-V
items.summary_en: Anos is a hand-written microkernel around 100 KiB supporting x86-64 and RISC-V, designed for exploration of OS fundamentals in tiny footprints. It serves as a learning and research vehicle for kernel design and cross-architecture ideas. It’s a niche project, but interesting for students and OS enthusiasts.
items.summary_zh: Anos 是一个约 100 KiB 的手写微内核，支持 x86-64 与 RISC-V，用于探索极小体量系统中的操作系统基础。它可以作为内核设计与跨架构思路的学习与研究载体，对计算机系学生和操作系统爱好者具有吸引力。

items.title_en: Show HN: I pipe free sports streams into Jellyfin – no ads, just HLS
items.title_zh: Show HN：我把免费体育直播推送到 Jellyfin——无广告，只有 HLS
items.summary_en: A Show HN post describes piping free sports streams into Jellyfin via an HLS restream proxy, enabling ad-free, self-hosted viewing. It discusses practicality and potential legality of aggregating free streams into a personal media server.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 分享了通过HLS中继代理将免费体育流推送到Jellyfin，实现无广告的自托管观看。文中谈及 practicality 与将免费流聚合到自建媒体服务器的潜在合规性。

items.title_en: Bitmap fonts make computers feel like computers again
items.title_zh: 位图字体让电脑重新回归‘像计算机一样’的风格
items.summary_en: Bitmap fonts give UI a retro, hardware-software vibe, contrasting with modern scalable fonts. The post argues bitmap fonts can improve legibility and performance in certain contexts, reviving a nostalgic look.
items.summary_zh: 位图字体带来复古的硬件风格，提升在某些场景下的可读性与性能，与现代无衬线字体形成对比。文章主张在特定场景下重新采用位图字体，重现怀旧的计算机风格。

items.title_en: Keeping a Postgres Queue Healthy
items.title_zh: 保持 PostgreSQL 队列的健康
items.summary_en: Strategies to keep a PostgreSQL-backed queue healthy, focusing on monitoring, maintenance, and performance. The piece shares practical patterns to avoid bloat and ensure reliable async processing.
items.summary_zh: 介绍保持基于 PostgreSQL 的队列健康的实用策略，包括监控、维护和性能优化，旨在避免膨胀、提升异步处理的可靠性。

items.title_en: Model-Based Testing for Dungeons & Dragons
items.title_zh: 龙与地下城的模型化测试
items.summary_en: A blog applies model-based testing to Dungeons & Dragons, showing how formal models can generate test scenarios to validate game rules, balance, and interactions. It demonstrates how software testing methods can aid tabletop rule systems.
items.summary_zh: 博文将模型化测试应用于龙与地下城，展示如何用正式模型生成测试场景以验证规则、平衡与互动。说明软件测试方法也适用于桌上游戏的规则体系。

items.title_en: US summons bank bosses over cyber risks from Anthropic's latest AI model
items.title_zh: 美国就 Anthropic 最新 AI 模型引发的网络风险召集银行高管
items.summary_en: US regulators summoned bank chiefs to discuss cybersecurity risks associated with Anthropic's latest AI model, signaling regulatory scrutiny of AI-driven threat surfaces in finance. Could foreshadow new security standards for banks dealing with AI derivatives.
items.summary_zh: 监管机构召集银行高管，讨论与 Anthropic 最新 AI 模型相关的网络安全风险，显示金融领域正在关注 AI 带来的新威胁面，可能推动银行在安全标准上的新要求。

items.title_en: The Clock
items.title_zh: 时钟
items.summary_en: A contemplative piece about the nature of time, expressed through a clock-themed project.
items.summary_zh: 以钟为核心的项目探讨时间的本质。

items.title_en: Show HN: Moon simulator game, ray-casting
items.title_zh: Show HN：月球模拟游戏，光线投射
items.summary_en: Showcases a moon simulator game built with ray-casting, delivering pseudo-3D visuals with simple geometry. The project illustrates how classic rendering techniques can deliver engaging experiences with modest resources and provides insight into performance-focused game dev.
items.summary_zh: 展示一款基于光线投射的月球模拟游戏，利用简单几何实现伪三维视觉。该项目展示了经典渲染技术在资源有限下也能打造有趣的游戏体验，并提供对性能导向的开发洞察。

items.title_en: Show HN: Modo – I built an open-source alternative to Kiro, Cursor, and Windsurf
items.title_zh: Show HN：Modo——我构建的开源替代品，针对 Kiro、Cursor 与 Windsurf
items.summary_en: Modo is an open-source project offering an alternative to Kiro, Cursor, and Windsurf, likely in the space of UI frameworks or window management. It showcases evolving tools for developer ergonomics and cross-platform UI flows.
items.summary_zh: Modo 是一个开源项目，提供对 Kiro、Cursor 和 Windsurf 的替代方案，涉及 UI 框架或窗口管理领域，展示了开发者工具生态的演化与跨平台 UI 体验的探索。

items.title_en: Layoff Thinking
items.title_zh: 裁员思维
items.summary_en: Shares strategic thinking around layoffs in tech organizations—covering planning, communication, and management to preserve morale and long-term resilience during workforce reductions.
items.summary_zh: 分享科技组织在裁员过程中的前瞻性思考：包括计划、沟通与治理，以在裁员时维持士气并提升长期韧性。

items.title_en: Microsoft PhotoDNA scanning problem
items.title_zh: 微软 PhotoDNA 扫描问题
items.summary_en: Reports a problem with Microsoft PhotoDNA scanning, touching on performance, reliability, and potential privacy or moderation implications. The issue highlights the challenges of scalable image scanning in software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 报道了 Microsoft PhotoDNA 扫描相关的问题，涉及性能、可靠性以及潜在的隐私或内容审核影响，凸显在软件生态系统中实现大规模图像扫描的挑战。

items.title_en: Moving from WordPress to Jekyll (and static site generators in general)
items.title_zh: 从 WordPress 迁移到 Jekyll，以及静态站点生成器的思考
items.summary_en: Describes rebuilding a site with Jekyll after WordPress, highlighting gains in performance, security, and simplicity. It also reflects on the broader shift to static site generators and how tooling like Claude can complement content workflows.
items.summary_zh: 讲述从 WordPress 迁移到 Jekyll 的过程，强调加载速度、安全性和维护简化等收益，并讨论静态站点生成器的趋势及相关工具在内容工作流中的互补作用。

items.title_en: Breaking the console: a brief history of video game security
items.title_zh: 打破游戏机：电子游戏安全简史
items.summary_en: A concise history of how video game consoles evolved to fend off hacks and piracy, from cartridge protections to online ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 简要回顾电子游戏机如何从对抗破解与盗版的初期保护，发展到如今的在线生态系统的演变过程。

items.title_en: The Miller Principle (2007)
items.title_zh: 米勒原则（2007）
items.summary_en: A concise note from 2007 about the Miller Principle, offering a compact guideline in software development or systems thinking.
items.summary_zh: 2007 年的一则简短笔记，阐述米勒原则，提供软件开发或系统思维领域的简要准则。

items.title_en: What is a property?
items.title_zh: 什么是属性？
items.summary_en: Explores the concept of a property across mathematics and programming, clarifying how properties differ from values or methods and why that distinction matters in software design.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在数学与编程中“属性”的概念，澄清属性与数值、方法之间的区别，以及这一区别在软件设计中的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Tusk for macOS and Gnome
items.title_zh: Show HN：Tusk——面向 macOS 与 GNOME 的跨桌面实用工具
items.summary_en: Tusk is a cross-desktop utility targeting both macOS and GNOME, illustrating a push toward unified tooling across major DEs. It demonstrates how lightweight, desktop-native tools can improve developer workflows or daily productivity without venturing into heavy dependencies. If you care about cohesive UX across environments, watch this project.
items.summary_zh: Tusk 是一个面向 macOS 与 GNOME 的跨桌面实用工具，体现了在主要桌面环境间统一工具链的趋势。它强调轻量级、原生集成的工具如何改善开发者工作流和日常效率，而不依赖繁重的依赖。若关注跨环境的一致用户体验，值得关注。

items.title_en: The Mechanics of Steins Gate (2023) [pdf]
items.title_zh: Steins;Gate（2023）机制分析 [PDF]
items.summary_en: A PDF examining the mechanics of Steins;Gate (2023), likely surveying time-travel logic and narrative devices for fans and researchers studying storytelling, structure, or fandom artifacts.
items.summary_zh: 这份 PDF 评析《Steins;Gate》（2023）的叙事机制与时间旅行设定，面向粉丝与研究者，聚焦故事结构与叙事要素。

items.title_en: Show HN: Pion/handoff – Move WebRTC out of browser and into Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Pion/handoff 将 WebRTC 移出浏览器移至 Go
items.summary_en: Pion/handoff moves WebRTC processing from the browser to Go, enabling server-side media handling and greater scalability. It highlights a trend toward offloading compute for real-time communication.
items.summary_zh: Pion/handoff 将 WebRTC 处理从浏览器转移到 Go 服务器端，支持服务器端媒体处理与更好的可扩展性，体现了对实时通信进行计算卸载的趋势。

items.title_en: Floating point from scratch: Hard Mode
items.title_zh: 从零开始的浮点运算：硬核模式
items.summary_en: A hard mode project constructing floating point from scratch, revealing the intricate decisions around rounding, subnormals, and performance.
items.summary_zh: 一个从零开始实现浮点运算的硬核项目，揭示舍入、子正规数和性能等设计取舍的细节。

items.title_en: Small Engines
items.title_zh: 小型引擎
items.summary_en: Examines the viability and design of very small engines, discussing efficiency limits, materials, and how miniaturization challenges conventional performance assumptions.
items.summary_zh: 探讨极小型引擎的可行性与设计，讨论效率极限、材料选择，以及微型化如何挑战传统性能假设。

items.title_en: Intelligent people are better judges of the intelligence of others
items.title_zh: 聪明的人更善于判断他人的智力
items.summary_en: Psychology study finds that people with higher intelligence are better at judging others' intelligence, suggesting cognitive ability influences social perception and bias. The result informs how we interpret expert opinions and who is trusted in assessments of ability. It also prompts reflection on fairness and humility in judgment.
items.summary_zh: 一项心理学研究发现，智力水平更高的人在判断他人智力方面更为准确，表明认知能力影响社会认知与偏见。这一发现有助于理解为何某些人更易被视为权威，以及在评估能力时应保持谦逊与公平。

items.title_en: Wi-Fi That Can Withstand a Nuclear Reactor: This receiver chip can take it
items.title_zh: 能抗核反应堆辐射的 Wi Fi 接收芯片
items.summary_en: A radiation-hardened Wi Fi receiver chip enables reliable wireless monitoring near nuclear facilities. The design illustrates how extreme environments drive specialized hardware choices.
items.summary_zh: 一个抗辐射的 Wi Fi 接收芯片，能够在核设施等极端环境中实现可靠的无线监测。设计体现了极端条件驱动下的硬件取舍与应用场景。

items.title_en: A Perfectable Programming Language
items.title_zh: 可完善的编程语言
items.summary_en: Explores design principles for a programming language meant to be progressively improved over time, emphasizing a minimal core, extensibility, and verifiable correctness. The piece argues for a language with a small, stable core and a pathway for community-driven extensions, balancing practicality with long-term evolvability.
items.summary_zh: 探讨一种可逐步完善的编程语言的设计原则，强调最小核心、可扩展性与可验证性。文章提出以小而稳定的核心和社区驱动的扩展为路径，兼顾实用性和长期演化。

items.title_en: You can't cancel a JavaScript promise (except sometimes you can)
items.title_zh: 你不能取消 JavaScript 的 Promise（有时可以）
items.summary_en: JavaScript promises cannot be cancelled natively, but patterns exist to emulate cancellation such as AbortController and cancellation tokens.
items.summary_zh: JavaScript 的 Promise 原生不能取消，但可以通过 AbortController 等模式实现“取消”效果。文中解析了实际应用中的坑点与可靠控制流的常用做法。

items.title_en: Rockstar Games Hacked, Hackers Threaten a Massive Data Leak If Not Paid Ransom
items.title_zh: Rockstar Games 遭黑客入侵，若不支付赎金将面临大规模数据泄露
items.summary_en: Rockstar Games hacker incident with threat of massive data leak if not paid; underscores risk to game studios and potential exposure of source code and personal data.
items.summary_zh: 黑客入侵 Rockstar Games 并威胁若不付赎金将大规模泄露数据，凸显对游戏工作室的安全风险，以及源代码和个人数据等的潜在曝光。

items.title_en: Quien – A better WHOIS lookup tool
items.title_zh: Quien – 一个更好的 WHOIS 查找工具
items.summary_en: Quien launches a more readable, developer-friendly WHOIS experience with cleaner output and improved handling of privacy-protected domains. It focuses on usability and accurate data presentation for domain researchers and operators.
items.summary_zh: Quien 提供更易读、面向开发者的 WHOIS 查询体验，输出更清晰并更好地处理隐私保护域名，提升域名数据的可用性与准确性。

items.title_en: Apollo Guidance Computer restoration videos
