items.title_zh: 阿波罗导航计算机修复视频
items.summary_en: Restoration videos of the Apollo Guidance Computer showcase early spacecraft computing hardware, revealing how engineers wrestled with limited memory and real-time constraints. The clips highlight the ingenuity of vintage embedded systems and offer lessons for hardware preservation and emulation in modern projects.
items.summary_zh: 阿波罗导航计算机的修复视频展示了早期航天计算硬件，揭示工程师在极限资源条件下如何实现实时运算。此类材料凸显了早期嵌入式系统的巧思，并为现代硬件保存与仿真提供宝贵经验。

items.title_en: Investigating How Long-Distance Couples Use Digital Games to Facilitate Intimacy
items.title_zh: 研究远距离情侣如何通过电子游戏增进亲密感
items.summary_en: The study documents how couples in long-distance relationships use digital games to maintain closeness, shaping interactions, intimacy, and relationship satisfaction. It offers takeaways for designers of social games and remote communication tools.
items.summary_zh: 研究记录了远距离情侣如何通过数字游戏维持情感亲密，影响互动模式、情感表达与关系满意度。研究结果对社交游戏设计和远程沟通工具的发展提供了可转化的洞察。

items.title_en: A blind man made it possible for others with low vision to build Lego sets
items.title_zh: 盲人帮助低视力者搭建乐高积木
items.summary_en: A blind innovator developed accessible Lego-building instructions using audio descriptions and tactile cues, enabling others with low vision to build sets. The project expands inclusive play, helping more kids engage with STEM and collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 一位盲人倡议者开发了可访问的乐高搭建说明，结合音频描述与触觉线索，使视力受限者也能组装乐高积木，推动包容性游戏与 STEM 兴趣。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How do you handle marketing as a solo technical founder?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：作为单打独斗的技术创始人，你如何做市场推广？
items.summary_en: A Hacker News thread collecting real-world approaches from solo technical founders on marketing without a big team. Expect practical tips on positioning, content, product-led growth, and bootstrapped experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个 HN 话题，汇集了单打独斗的技术创始人关于市场推广的真实经验。包含定位、内容、产品驱动增长和自力更生的实操建议。

items.title_en: What does it mean to “write like you talk”?
items.title_zh: “像说话一样写”到底意味着什么？
items.summary_en: Explores embracing a conversational, direct voice in writing, dissecting when to adopt plain language and how tone affects comprehension, credibility, and accessibility. It offers guidance for writers across tech and non-tech domains.
items.summary_zh: 探讨在写作中采用对话式、直白的表达方式，并分析何时该用简单语言、语气如何影响理解力、可信度与可访问性。为科技与非科技领域的写作者提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Sc-im: Spreadsheets in your terminal
items.title_zh: Sc-im：终端中的电子表格
items.summary_en: Sc-im is a terminal-based spreadsheet editor that brings spreadsheet capabilities to the command line, with keyboard-driven navigation. It appeals to power users who need quick data manipulation on headless or low-resource environments, without leaving the terminal. For lightweight workflows, it can be a surprisingly productive alternative to GUI spreadsheets.
items.summary_zh: Sc-im 是一个在终端中运行的电子表格编辑器，支持键盘驱动的操作，直接在命令行里完成数据处理。它特别适合在无头或资源受限的环境下进行快速数据操作的高阶用户，无需离开终端即可完成工作。对于轻量级的工作流，这是一个出人意料的高效替代方案。

items.title_en: JSIR: A High-Level IR for JavaScript
items.title_zh: JSIR：面向 JavaScript 的高级中间表示
items.summary_en: JSIR proposes a high-level intermediate representation for JavaScript to improve compiler optimizations and cross-tooling. It aims to bridge JS engines with LLVM-like backends, enabling more portable and aggressive optimizations while preserving JS semantics.
items.summary_zh: JSIR 提出一种面向 JavaScript 的高级中间表示，旨在提升编译器优化与跨工具链的能力。它试图将 JS 引擎与类似 LLVM 的后端衔接，以实现更可移植、且更具侵袭性的优化，同时保留 JavaScript 的语义。

items.title_en: How much linear memory access is enough?
items.title_zh: 线性内存访问到底需要多少？
items.summary_en: Questions how much linear memory access a program truly needs, challenging the assumption that more bandwidth always helps. It advocates for data locality, cache-friendly layouts, and practical heuristics to avoid memory bottlenecks in modern software.
items.summary_zh: 探讨程序对线性内存访问的真实需求，质疑“带宽越多越好”的普遍观点。强调数据局部性、缓存友好布局与在现代软件中避免内存瓶颈的实用方法。

items.title_en: Why AI Sucks at Front End
items.title_zh: AI 为什么在前端开发中表现劣势
items.summary_en: AI struggles with frontend tasks due to nuanced UI/UX, accessibility, and component composition that require human judgment. The piece argues AI is best used as an assistant rather than a replacement for frontend engineers.
items.summary_zh: AI 在前端开发中难以处理细粒度的用户体验、无障碍与组件组合等问题，易出错。文章认为应将 AI 作为辅助工具，而非试图替代有经验的前端工程师。

items.title_en: The APL programming language source code (2012)
items.title_zh: APL 编程语言源代码（2012）
items.summary_en: Describes the 2012 release of the APL language source code, offering historical insight into this foundational array programming language and how its tooling evolved. Highlights lessons for modern developers from its design and implementation.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 2012 年发布的 APL 语言源代码，为这一基础的数组编程语言及其工具的发展提供历史洞见，强调从其设计与实现中对当代开发者的启示。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Twill.ai (YC S25) – Delegate to cloud agents, get back PRs
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Twill.ai（YC S25）——把任务交给云代理，返还 PR
items.summary_en: Twill.ai bills itself as a platform that delegates tasks to cloud agents and returns pull requests, effectively outsourcing collaboration to AI-driven automation. For dev teams, it promises faster iteration, but raises questions about security, governance, and auditability of autonomous agents.
items.summary_zh: Twill.ai 宣称通过云代理执行任务并返回 PRs，将协作工作交给 AI 驱动的自动化系统。对开发团队而言意味着更快迭代，同时也引出安全、治理与可审计性的问题。

items.title_en: Previously unknown verses by Empedocles found on papyrus
items.title_zh: 埃姆多克勒斯在纸草卷上发现的未知诗句
items.summary_en: A newly discovered papyrus fragment contains verses attributed to the pre-Socratic philosopher Empedocles, offering fresh evidence of his poetry. The find enriches our understanding of ancient Greek thought and the transmission of his work, with possible revisions to readings of his elemental theory.
items.summary_zh: 一份新发现的纸草卷证据显示埃姆多克勒斯的未知诗句，为其诗作提供新的证据，丰富了对古希腊思想及其文本传承的理解，可能对其四元素理论的解读产生影响。

items.title_en: Tracing Goroutines in Realtime with eBPF
items.title_zh: 用 eBPF 实时追踪 Goroutines
items.summary_en: Techniques for tracing Go goroutines in real-time using eBPF; discusses insights into performance, concurrency, and debugging.
items.summary_zh: 介绍如何使用 eBPF 实时追踪 Go 程序中的 goroutine，展示在性能、并发与调试方面的洞见与实践。

items.title_en: Principles of Mechanical Sympathy
items.title_zh: 机械同情原则
items.summary_en: Martin Fowler's concept of aligning software with the hardware it runs on is explored, arguing that teams should optimize for the entire stack rather than chasing fastest code in isolation. The piece outlines principles like reducing hidden costs, choosing appropriate abstractions, and designing for maintainability alongside performance.
items.summary_zh: 解读 Martin Fowler 的机械同情理念，强调让软件设计与底层硬件协同工作，而不是只追求局部极致性能。文章提出降低隐藏成本、选择合适的抽象，以及在可维护性与性能之间取得平衡的设计要点。

items.title_en: DeiMOS – A Superoptimizer for the MOS 6502
items.title_zh: MOS 6502 的超级优化器 DeiMOS
items.summary_en: DeiMOS is a MOS 6502 superoptimizer that searches for tiny, fast instruction sequences; a retrocomputing tool that pushes the boundaries of optimization on classic hardware.
items.summary_zh: DeiMOS 是一款面向 MOS 6502 的超级优化器，能够搜索更小更快的指令序列，推动经典硬件上的优化边界。

items.title_en: Phone Trips
items.title_zh: 手机之旅
items.summary_en: Phone Trips surveys how smartphones shape travel storytelling, capturing experiences, and sharing them on the go.
items.summary_zh: 《手机之旅》探讨智能手机如何改变旅行叙事，记录并传播旅途中的瞬间。文章讨论了移动拍摄的技巧、局限以及让旅行内容大众化的趋势。

items.title_en: Show HN: A WYSIWYG word processor in Python
items.title_zh: Show HN: 用 Python 实现的所见即所得文字处理器
items.summary_en: A Python-based WYSIWYG editor demonstrates a usable, lightweight rich-text tool built with a high-level language. It illustrates that productive desktop apps can be built outside mainstream UI stacks, though ecosystem trade-offs apply.
items.summary_zh: 一个用 Python 实现的所见即所得文字处理器展示了轻量、离线友好的富文本编辑能力。证明高层语言也能支撑实用的桌面应用，但在性能和生态方面需要权衡。

items.title_en: Combining spicy foods with mint boosts anti-inflammatory effects 100x or more
items.title_zh: 辣味食品与薄荷结合可显著提升抗炎效果
items.summary_en: Preliminary findings claim that pairing spicy foods with mint dramatically increases anti-inflammatory effects, potentially by hundreds of times. Real-world replication is needed, but the result is intriguing for nutrition science.
items.summary_zh: 有研究称辣味食品与薄荷结合能显著提升抗炎效果，甚至达到百倍以上的增幅。需在现实情景中进一步验证，但为营养与药理研究提供了新的线索。

items.title_en: Eighteen Years of Greytrapping – Is the Weirdness Finally Paying Off?
items.title_zh: 18年的 Greytrapping：怪异做法终于见效？
items.summary_en: A retrospective on 'greytrapping' over eighteen years questions whether the quirky method's payoff is finally showing as defenses improve. It discusses the tension between novelty and reliability in ongoing experiments and the value of patience in evaluating odd techniques.
items.summary_zh: 对“Greytrapping”在过去18年的回顾提出质疑：在防御日益加强的背景下，这一怪异做法的“回报”是否终于显现。文章讨论在持续的实验中新奇性与可靠性之间的张力，以及评估非常规技术时耐心的重要性。

items.title_en: "The new Copilot app for Windows 11 is really just Microsoft Edge"
items.title_zh: 新版 Copilot 应用其实就是 Microsoft Edge
items.summary_en: The new Copilot app for Windows 11 may be leveraging Edge under the hood, prompting debate about app identity and Windows integration.
items.summary_zh: 有观点认为 Windows 11 新版 Copilot 应用在底层其实是 Edge 的包装，引发关于应用身份与系统整合的讨论。

items.title_en: Investigating Split Locks on x86-64
items.title_zh: 在 x86-64 上的分割锁调查
items.summary_en: The post explains what split locks are in x86-64, their impact on performance and correctness in concurrent code, and how modern CPUs and programming practices mitigate them. It provides practical guidance for developers to avoid split-lock pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 文章阐述了 x86-64 架构中的分割锁（split locks）是什么、它们对并发代码的性能与正确性的影响，以及现代 CPU 与编程实践如何降低风险。为开发者提供了避免分割锁陷阱的实用建议。

items.title_en: C# in Unity 2026: Writing more modern code
items.title_zh: Unity 2026 中的 C#：编写更现代的代码
items.summary_en: Unity 2026 expands C# features and tooling to support modern patterns such as async/await, source generators, and enhanced tooling for maintainable gameplay code. This raises the bar for Unity developers, enabling more robust cross-platform development.
items.summary_zh: Unity 2026 在 C# 语言特性与工具链上引入对现代编程模式的支持，如 async/await、源生成器，以及改进的工具链，用以编写更易维护的游戏代码。这将提升跨平台开发的鲁棒性与生产力。

items.title_en: Show HN: We fingerprinted 178 AI models' writing styles and similarity clusters
items.title_zh: Show HN：我们对178个AI模型的写作风格进行指纹识别并聚类
items.summary_en: The project fingerprints writing styles across 178 AI models and clusters them by similarity. This helps with model attribution and provenance checks, and could aid in detecting model reuse, though it also raises concerns about privacy and misuse.
items.summary_zh: 该工作对178个AI模型的写作风格进行指纹提取，并据此提出相似性聚类。对于溯源与检测模型复用有帮助，但也带来隐私与滥用方面的担忧。

items.title_en: Now is the best time to write code by hand
items.title_zh: 现在是用手写代码的最佳时机
items.summary_en: Argues that writing code by hand strengthens mental models and aids deeper understanding of algorithms, with practical exercises and scenarios where handwriting enhances craftsmanship.
items.summary_zh: 认为手写代码能强化认知模型，帮助更深入理解算法；给出实用练习与情境，说明手写对软件工匠精神的价值。

items.title_en: The Soul of an Old Machine
items.title_zh: 旧机器的灵魂
items.summary_en: Reflects on the 'soul' of aging hardware, drawing parallels with modern systems and emphasizing lessons on reliability, debt, and maintenance. It argues that studying old machines can illuminate durable design principles.
items.summary_zh: 反思老旧硬件的“灵魂”，将其与现代系统对比，强调可靠性、技术债务与维护方面的经验教训。认为研究旧机器有助于理解持久的设计原则。

items.title_en: A new Postcrossing stamp from the USA
items.title_zh: 美国推出新一枚 Postcrossing 邮票
items.summary_en: Postcrossing unveils a new stamp from the USA to celebrate international postcard exchanges. The release highlights cultural outreach through philately and the ongoing appeal of physical mail in a digital era.
items.summary_zh: Postcrossing 公布美国新邮票，庆祝全球明信片互寄。此举强调通过集邮进行的文化交流，以及在数字时代对实体邮寄的持续兴趣。

items.title_en: Little Snitch comes to Linux, but the core logic is closed source
items.title_zh: Little Snitch 登陆 Linux，但核心逻辑仍然闭源
items.summary_en: Linux users get a port of the macOS firewall utility Little Snitch, though the essential rule-matching engine remains closed source. This limits auditability and security assurances while offering familiar UX; the piece discusses trade-offs between usability and openness and surveys open-source alternatives.
items.summary_zh: Linux 用户获得了 macOS 防火墙工具 Little Snitch 的移植版本，但核心规则匹配引擎仍然闭源。这限制了可审计性和安全保障，同时保留了熟悉的用户体验；文章讨论了易用性与开放性之间的权衡，并对开源替代方案进行评估。

items.title_en: Porting Go's strings package to C
items.title_zh: 把 Go 的 strings 包移植到 C
items.summary_en: An effort to port Go's standard strings package to C, likely for interoperability or performance reasons. The post may cover API compatibility, memory management considerations, and potential use cases where C projects benefit from Go-like string utilities.
items.summary_zh: 将 Go 的 strings 标准库移植到 C 的尝试，可能旨在实现互操作性或提升性能。文中可能讨论 API 兼容性、内存管理以及在 C 项目中使用 Go 风格字符串工具的潜在场景。

items.title_en: Uncharted island soon to appear on nautical charts
items.title_zh: 尚未在海图上标注的岛屿将很快出现在航海图上
items.summary_en: A previously uncharted island has been confirmed and will soon appear on nautical charts, marking progress in remote-area mapping. This matters for navigation safety, logistics, and scientific operations in the region.
items.summary_zh: 一座先前未被绘制的岛屿已被确认，即将出现在航海图上，标志着对偏远水域的制图工作取得进展。这对航海安全、补给与科学考察的后勤具有重要意义。

items.title_en: The AI Great Leap Forward
items.title_zh: 人工智能的大跃进
items.summary_en: A provocative take on how AI progress could reshape computing, work, and society, discussing acceleration, risks, and governance needs to prepare for wide-scale adoption.
items.summary_zh: 对人工智能发展可能重塑计算、工作与社会的进程进行挑衅性评述，讨论发展速度、潜在风险以及需要的治理与准备。

items.title_en: The difficulty of making sure your website is broken
items.title_zh: 确保你的网站确实出问题有多难
items.summary_en: Ensuring a website fails gracefully and predictably is harder than it looks. The article emphasizes realistic failure scenarios, monitoring, and rapid failover capabilities to validate system resilience.
items.summary_zh: 确保网站在各种异常情况下仍能优雅降级和恢复，看起来并不容易。文章强调需要现实的故障情景、监控与快速故障切换的能力来验证系统韧性。

items.title_en: Mexican surveillance company Grupo Seguritech watches the U.S. border
items.title_zh: 墨西哥监控公司 Grupo Seguritech 监视美国边境
items.summary_en: Rest of World reports on a Mexican surveillance firm linked to government border monitoring, raising concerns about privatized surveillance and cross-border data practices.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示墨西哥监控公司 Grupo Seguritech 为政府进行边境监控，凸显私有化监控在跨境数据使用与人权方面的潜在风险。

items.title_en: Agent Reading Test
items.title_zh: 代理阅读测试
items.summary_en: Agent Reading Test is likely a benchmark designed to evaluate AI agents' reading comprehension and in-text reasoning. It highlights how agents interpret instructions, extract facts, and answer questions, informing how we measure progress in natural language understanding for agents. It can help guide future dataset design and evaluation metrics.
items.summary_zh: 代理阅读测试是一套用于评估AI代理阅读理解与文本推理能力的基准。它关注代理如何解读指令、提取事实并回答问题，为衡量代理在自然语言理解方面的进展提供指标。对于数据集设计和评估标准具有参考价值。

items.title_en: Baby's Second Garbage Collector
items.title_zh: 宝宝的第二个垃圾回收器
items.summary_en: An explorative post about implementing a second garbage collector, discussing design trade-offs, throughput, and memory management. It offers practical insights into how GC design evolves in language runtimes.
items.summary_zh: 本文讲述实现第二个垃圾回收器的过程，分析设计权衡、吞吐量与内存管理等要点，提供对语言运行时 GC 演进的实际见解。

items.title_en: Zooming UIs in 2026: Prezi, impress.js, and why I built something different
items.title_zh: 2026 年的缩放式 UI：Prezi、impress.js，以及我为何做出不同的方案
items.summary_en: The piece surveys zooming user interfaces like Prezi and impress.js and explains why the author chose a different approach. It reflects on how panning, zooming, and 3D navigation shape user attention and information hierarchy, and why a distinct UI paradigm may better suit modern storytelling or data exploration. Good read for product designers and frontend developers.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾了 Prezi、impress.js 等缩放式 UI 的趋势，并解释作者为何选择不同的实现方式。内容聚焦平移、缩放和三维导航如何影响用户注意力与信息层级，以及为何一种更独特的 UI 模型可能更适用于现代叙事与数据探索。对产品设计与前端开发者很有启发。

items.title_en: OpenJDK: Panama
items.title_zh: OpenJDK：巴拿马计划
items.summary_en: OpenJDK Panama focuses on improving interop between Java and native code via foreign function interfaces, simplifying calls to native libraries and data sharing.
items.summary_zh: OpenJDK 巴拿马计划致力于通过外部函数接口改进 Java 与本地代码的互操作，简化调用本地库和数据共享的工作。

items.title_en: Record wind and solar saved UK from gas imports worth £1B in March 2026
items.title_zh: 风电与太阳能创纪录帮助英国在 2026 年 3 月避开约 10 亿英镑的燃气进口
items.summary_en: Wind and solar generation in March 2026 saved the UK about £1 billion in gas imports, illustrating renewables' impact on energy security and bills.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月，风电与太阳能发电创纪录，帮助英国避免约 10 亿英镑的燃气进口支出，显示可再生能源对能源安全和账单的积极影响。

items.title_en: Mario and Earendil
items.title_zh: 马里奥与埃兰迪尔
items.summary_en: An essay drawing cross-media comparisons between Mario and Earendil to explore mythmaking, heroism, and navigation across games and high fantasy, highlighting shared storytelling devices.
items.summary_zh: 通过对马里奥与埃兰迪尔的跨媒介对照，探讨英雄叙事、航行与神话建构等主题，揭示不同媒介中的共通讲述手法。

items.title_en: An AI robot in my home
items.title_zh: 家中有一个 AI 机器人
items.summary_en: Personal narrative on living with an AI robot at home, covering daily interactions, safety, privacy, and how such automation reshapes domestic life. The piece reflects on practical implications and future expectations.
items.summary_zh: 讲述家中有一台 AI 机器人的亲身经历，涉及日常互动、安全与隐私，以及这种自动化如何改变家庭生活。讨论实际影响与未来前景。

items.title_en: USD Purchasing Power in Real Time Since 2000
items.title_zh: 自 2000 年以来美元购买力的实时变化
items.summary_en: A live visualization tracks how much a dollar buys over time, offering a compact view of inflation trends and purchasing-power erosion since 2000.
items.summary_zh: 一个实时可视化工具呈现自 2000 年以来美元购买力的变化，帮助读者直观感受通胀趋势与购买力的下降。

items.title_en: Move Detroit
items.title_zh: Move Detroit 项目
items.summary_en: Move Detroit acts as a civic tech program aimed at improving mobility, transit access, and urban life in Detroit. It typically brings together residents, local government, and tech partners to pilot data-driven transport solutions.
items.summary_zh: Move Detroit 是一个公民科技计划，旨在改善底特律的出行、交通可达性和城市生活。它通常汇集居民、地方政府和科技伙伴，推动数据驱动的交通方案试点。

items.title_en: IPv6 is the only way forward
items.title_zh: IPv6 将成为未来唯一出路
items.summary_en: Argues IPv6 is essential for the future as IPv4 exhaustion accelerates, with practical steps for deployment and the advantages of a larger address space and improved security features.
items.summary_zh: 认为随着 IPv4 地址枯竭加速，IPv6 是未来的必要之路，文中给出部署要点并强调更大的地址空间和改进的安全特性带来的优势。

items.title_en: Show HN: A (marginally) useful x86-64 ELF executable in 301 bytes
items.title_zh: Show HN：一个 301 字节的 x86-64 ELF 可执行文件
items.summary_en: Show HN features a tiny x86-64 ELF binary that performs a useful task in just 301 bytes. It shares the tricks and techniques used to cram functionality into an ultra-compact executable, highlighting code-golf style ingenuity and the boundaries of practical minimalism.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示一个仅 301 字节的 x86-64 ELF 可执行文件所实现的实用功能。文章揭示了将实用功能压缩到极小体积的技巧，体现了代码、高密度极简主义的创造力。

items.title_en: DOJ Top Antitrust Litigators Exit After Ticketmaster Accord
items.title_zh: Ticketmaster 和解后 DOJ 顶级反垄断诉讼律师离任
items.summary_en: Following a Ticketmaster settlement, several top antitrust litigators depart from the DOJ, signaling possible shifts in enforcement strategy. The departures could influence future antitrust actions against major platforms.
items.summary_zh: Ticketmaster 和解后， DOJ 顶级反垄断诉讼律师离任，可能预示执法策略的变化。离任或影响未来对大型平台的反垄断行动方式。

items.title_en: Artemis II and the invisible hazard on the way to the Moon
items.title_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯 II号任务：月球之路上的隐形风险
items.summary_en: Artemis II faces unseen hazards for crewed lunar missions, including radiation exposure, long-duration isolation, and system reliability under deep-space conditions. The piece argues for rigorous risk management and robust life-support and shielding.
items.summary_zh: 阿耳忒弥斯 II 号任务面临对载人月球任务的隐形风险，如辐射暴露、长期孤立与深空条件下系统可靠性。强调需要严格的风险管理、强健的生命支持和防护措施。

items.title_en: New synthesis of astronomical measurements shows Hubble tension is real
items.title_zh: 新一轮天文观测综合显示哈勃张力确实存在
items.summary_en: A synthesis of astronomical measurements reinforces the Hubble tension, showing a persistent discrepancy in the universe’s expansion rate across datasets. The result fuels discussions on potential new physics or unaccounted systematics.
items.summary_zh: 多项天文观测的综合结果进一步强化了哈勃张力的存在，显示在宇宙膨胀速率的测量中存在持续的不一致。其影响在于引发对新物理学或潜在系统误差的讨论。

items.title_en: Improving storage efficiency in Magic Pocket, Dropbox's immutable blob store
items.title_zh: Magic Pocket 的存储效率提升：Dropbox 的不可变 Blob 存储
items.summary_en: Details methods to improve storage efficiency in Magic Pocket, Dropbox's immutable blob store, including deduplication, compression, and encoding optimizations that preserve immutability.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在 Dropbox 的不可变 Blob 存储 Magic Pocket 中提升存储效率的做法，包括去重、压缩与编码优化，同时保持不可变性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Keeper – embedded secret store for Go (help me break it)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Keeper——Go 的嵌入式秘密存储（帮助我破解它）
items.summary_en: Keeper offers an embedded secret store for Go, designed for local secrecy and simplicity, with an open invitation for security researchers to audit and attempt to break it. The project aims to surface security insights through challenge.
items.summary_zh: Keeper 为 Go 提供嵌入式秘密存储，主打本地隐私与易用性，并公开邀请安全研究者审计与尝试破解。此举旨在通过挑战暴露安全隐患。

items.title_en: Robots eat cars
items.title_zh: 机器人吃掉汽车
items.summary_en: Explores robotics advances where robots interact with automobiles, from manufacturing scale to waste recycling or automation of car-related tasks. Highlights how increasingly capable robots accelerate disruption across industries.
items.summary_zh: 探讨机器人在汽车行业中的应用与挑战，涵盖制造、回收等场景中机器人对汽车的处理与操作能力提升。凸显日益强大的机器人对各行业的颠覆潜力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Go-Bt: Minimalist Behavior Trees for Go
items.title_zh: Show HN：Go-Bt：Go语言的极简行为树
items.summary_en: A minimalist Behavior Tree library for Go that enables building AI agents with simple, composable blocks. It’s useful for game AI, robotics, or simulations implemented in Go.
items.summary_zh: 一个为Go设计的极简行为树库，便于用简单、可组合的模块构建AI代理。适合用Go实现的游戏AI、机器人或仿真。

items.title_en: Apple's accidental moat: How the "AI Loser" may end up winning
items.title_zh: 苹果的意外护城河：AI 落后者也许会赢
items.summary_en: Apple's cautious stance on AI could become a durable moat, built on privacy, on-device AI, and a tightly integrated ecosystem. As competitors chase scale, Apple's trust advantage and user experience may prove sturdier over the long term.
items.summary_zh: 苹果对 AI 热潮的谨慎态度可能成为长期护城河，源自隐私保护、设备端 AI 与紧密的生态系统。随着竞争对手追逐规模，苹果在信任与用户体验方面的优势或在长期内更为稳固。

items.title_en: How a dancer with ALS used brainwaves to perform live
items.title_zh: 患 ALS 的舞者如何用脑波进行现场表演
items.summary_en: Describes a breakthrough where a dancer with ALS used brainwave control to perform live, highlighting the EEG-based interface, accessibility implications, and potential for inclusive performance tech.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在脑电波控制下实现现场表演的突破性案例，一位患 ALS 的舞者借此实现舞蹈表演。讨论所用的脑机接口、无障碍意义，以及对包容性表演技术的潜在影响。

items.title_en: PGLite Evangelism
items.title_zh: PGLite 的倡导之风
items.summary_en: A fervent post advocating for PGLite, outlining its vision, use cases, and trade-offs vs larger frameworks. It argues for simpler, composable tooling and urges developers to experiment with smaller, more approachable components.
items.summary_zh: 一篇热情的文章推广 PGLite，阐述其愿景、适用场景及相对于大型框架的取舍。主张使用更简单、可组合的工具，鼓励开发者尝试更小、易上手的组件。

items.title_en: One neat trick to end extreme poverty
items.title_zh: 有一个妙招能结束极端贫困
items.summary_en: Presents a provocative policy idea with potential to dramatically reduce extreme poverty if scaled, outlining why it matters for policymakers and technologists alike.
items.summary_zh: 提出一个具有放大效应的政策点子，如若大规模实施，理论上能显著降低极端贫困；文章解释了此点子对政策制定者和技术人员的重要性。

items.title_en: "Negative" views of Broadcom driving VMware migrations, rival says
items.title_zh: Broadcom 的负面形象推动 VMware 迁移
items.summary_en: Rival claims that negative perceptions of Broadcom are driving VMware customers to migrate, highlighting strategic tensions in enterprise virtualization and vendor consolidation.
items.summary_zh: 竞争对手称 Broadcom 的负面观感推动了 VMware 客户迁移，反映出企业虚拟化市场对平台收购与战略的敏感性。

items.title_en: Got kicked out of uni and had the cops called for a social media website I made
items.title_zh: 因我做的社交媒体网站被学校驱逐并报警
items.summary_en: A personal anecdote about facing university expulsion and police involvement over a social media project, touching on online speech, moderation, and campus policy conflicts. It offers lessons on how platform ideas can collide with community norms and legal boundaries, and the cautionary tale for creators.
items.summary_zh: 作者因自己开发的社交网站在校园遭到退学并被警方介入，反映出校园政策、言论边界与社交平台设计之间的冲突。故事提供关于社区规范、法律边界以及个人创作风险的教训，提醒开发者在校园与公共领域的界限。

items.title_en: Americans still opt for print books over digital or audio versions
items.title_zh: 美国人仍偏爱纸质书而非数字或有声版本
items.summary_en: Pew data shows Americans still prefer print books to digital or audio formats, with implications for libraries, publishers, and reading clubs.
items.summary_zh: 皮尤研究显示美国人仍偏好纸质书籍而非数字或有声版本，这对图书馆、出版商和读书会等生态有重要影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Eve – Managed OpenClaw for work
items.title_zh: Show HN：Eve——面向工作场景的托管 OpenClaw
items.summary_en: Show HN: Eve showcases a managed OpenClaw deployment for workplaces, detailing onboarding, access control, and operational considerations. It signals growing enterprise interest in hosted AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Show HN：Eve 展示了面向工作场景的托管 OpenClaw 部署，涵盖上手流程、访问控制与运维要点，体现企业对托管 AI 工具日益增长的兴趣。

items.title_en: Show HN: Skrun – Deploy any agent skill as an API
items.title_zh: Show HN：Skrun——将任意代理技能部署为 API
items.summary_en: Showcases Skrun, a tool that deploys any agent skill as an API, enabling developers to expose autonomous agent capabilities as HTTP endpoints and orchestrate tool usage easily.
items.summary_zh: 展示 Skrun，一个将任意代理技能部署为 API 的工具，便于开发者将自主代理能力以 HTTP 接口暴露并简化工具的编排。

items.title_en: Sonnet 4.6 Elevated Rate of Errors
items.title_zh: Sonnet 4.6：错误率提升
items.summary_en: Status page notes an elevated error rate for Sonnet 4.6, indicating an outage or degraded performance in the Claude service line. The incident underscores the fragility of AI services and the importance of operational resilience and incident response.
items.summary_zh: 状态页显示 Sonnet 4.6 的错误率上升，表明 Claude 服务出现中断或性能下降。此次事件凸显 AI 服务的易损性，以及建立运维韧性和有效应急机制的重要性。

items.title_en: YouTube locked my accounts and I can't cancel my subscription
items.title_zh: YouTube 锁定我的账户，无法取消订阅
items.summary_en: Account lockouts prevent canceling a subscription, highlighting tangles of platform control and customer rights. The case underscores user friction in account management and raises questions about account ownership and support.
items.summary_zh: 账户被锁定，无法取消订阅的经历凸显了平台控制与用户权利之间的矛盾。此事暴露了账户管理中的摩擦点，并引发对账户所有权与客服支持的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Unicode Steganography
items.title_zh: Show HN：Unicode 隐写术
items.summary_en: Show HN project demonstrates using Unicode characters to hide data inside plain text, exploring practical techniques and detection challenges. The project reveals how subtle typographic tricks can convey payloads, suggesting both novelty and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 项目展示了如何在纯文本中利用 Unicode 字符进行隐写，将数据隐藏在看似普通的文本里，并探讨了检测的难点。该方案揭示了打字排版中的微妙技巧所能承载的载荷，同时带来新颖性与安全性方面的思考。

items.title_en: Show HN: Druids – Build your own software factory
items.title_zh: Show HN：Druids——打造你自己的软件工厂
items.summary_en: Introduces Druids as a framework to compose and automate software production pipelines, from building to testing to release, aiming to standardize and accelerate development. Includes examples or a repo to try.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Druids 这一框架，用于组装与自动化软件开发流水线（构建、测试、发布），旨在标准化并加速开发过程，并附有示例与仓库供实践。

items.title_en: We replaced Node.js with Bun for 5x throughput
items.title_zh: 我们用 Bun 取代 Node.js，吞吐量提升 5 倍
items.summary_en: A production-oriented note shows swapping Node.js for Bun yielded roughly 5x throughput on a real workload. It discusses compatibility trade-offs and ecosystem gaps, and what this means for teams weighing Bun for server-side scripting or APIs. A pragmatic look at runtime choices.
items.summary_zh: 一篇面向生产的笔记显示，将 Node.js 替换为 Bun，在实际工作负载上大约实现了 5 倍吞吐量。文中讨论了兼容性权衡与生态系统差距，以及这对考虑使用 Bun 的团队意味着什么。对运行时选择给出了务实的视角。

items.title_en: Dear Heroku: Uhh What's Going On?
items.title_zh: 亲爱的 Heroku：到底怎么了？
items.summary_en: Developers relying on Heroku experience changes in service, pricing, or support that complicate app hosting and deployment strategies. The note raises questions about platform dependency, migration options, and the resilience of cloud-backed workflows.
items.summary_zh: 依赖 Heroku 的开发者面临服务变动、定价调整或支持变动带来的挑战，影响应用托管与部署策略。该情况引发关于平台依赖、迁移路径和云端工作流韧性的讨论。

items.title_en: Emotion Concepts and Their Function in a Large Language Model
items.title_zh: 大型语言模型中的情感概念及其功能
items.summary_en: It argues that even if emotions are not truly felt, modelling them can guide safer and more relatable responses.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨大型语言模型是否具备显式的情感概念，以及这些概念在推理、对齐和用户体验中的作用。即使模型不真的有情感，建模情感也能引导更安全、易于理解的回复。

items.title_en: Show HN: TTF-DOOM – A raycaster running inside TrueType font hinting
items.title_zh: Show HN：TTF-DOOM——在 TrueType 字体提示处理中运行的光线投射渲染器
items.summary_en: TTF-DOOM is a playful experiment that runs a raycaster inside TrueType font hinting, turning font hinting into a tiny compute sandbox for visuals. It showcases creative use of typography pipelines and could inspire niche demonstrations of how fonts can carry computational ideas. For enthusiasts, it’s a proof-of-concept bridging fonts and retro rendering.
items.summary_zh: TTF-DOOM 将光线投射渲染器嵌入到 TrueType 字体提示处理中，利用字体 hinting 进行小规模计算与渲染的实验。展示了排版管线的创造性用法，可能启发将字体与计算概念结合的有趣演示。对爱好者来说，这是字体与光线投射的概念验证。

items.title_en: High-Level Rust: Getting 80% of the Benefits with 20% of the Pain
items.title_zh: Rust 高层次用法：用最小痛苦获得80%的收益
items.summary_en: A pragmatic guide to reaping most of Rust's benefits with minimal pain. The author highlights practical patterns that deliver about 80% of Rust's safety and performance with relatively light learning, plus caveats when deeper knowledge is needed.
items.summary_zh: 该文从实用角度出发，展示在不深入掌握所有高级特性的前提下如何用 Rust 获得大部分收益。通过高效的模式、易用的抽象和安全默认，提供约80%的收益，附带何时需要深入 Unsafe 或低层优化的建议。

items.title_en: Building a framework-agnostic Ruby gem (and making sure it doesn't break)
items.title_zh: 构建一个框架无关的 Ruby gem（并确保它不会出问题）
items.summary_en: Describes building a Ruby gem designed to work across frameworks and how to keep it dependable as ecosystems evolve.
items.summary_zh: 介绍打造一个框架无关的 Ruby gem，以及在生态演变中保持稳定性的做法。内容涵盖抽象边界、兼容性测试，以及使库长期可用的设计哲学。

items.title_en: A security scanner as fast as a linter – written in Rust
items.title_zh: 用 Rust 编写的安全扫描器，速度堪比 linter
items.summary_en: A security scanner written in Rust achieves speeds comparable to linters, combining speed with safety guarantees. The project showcases Rust’s potential for scalable developer tooling.
items.summary_zh: 用 Rust 编写的安全扫描器速度接近 linter，展示在保持安全性同时实现高性能的潜力。其工具化特性对大型代码库的静态分析尤具价值。

items.title_en: Network Flow Algorithms
items.title_zh: 网络流算法
items.summary_en: A structured hub of network flow algorithms, including max flow, min cut, and related topics, with explanations and references. A go-to reference for students and professionals.
items.summary_zh: 网络流算法的系统资源，覆盖最大流、最小割等核心问题，含解释与参考。是学生与从业者的实用参考。

items.title_en: The back story behind the first "$1.8B" dollar "AI Company"
items.title_zh: 第一家达到 18 亿美元估值的 AI 公司的幕后故事
items.summary_en: Gary Marcus revisits the origins and hype surrounding the first company valued at $1.8B in AI, likely examining funding, founders, and the broader context of AI startup narratives. The piece offers cautionary insight into market timing, fundraising, and the limits of hype.
items.summary_zh: Gary Marcus 回顾了这家首家达到 18 亿美元估值的 AI 公司的起源与炒作背景，分析融资、创始人及 AI 初创故事的宏观语境。文章对市场时机、募资过程以及宣传 hype 的局限性提出警示。

items.title_en: Eternity in six hours: Intergalactic spreading of intelligent life (2013)
items.title_zh: 六小时的永恒：星际传播的智能生命与费米悖论（2013）
items.summary_en: A speculative essay argues that intelligent life could spread across galaxies on cosmic timescales via self-replicating probes or rapid expansion, narrowing the Fermi paradox.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于在星际尺度上智能生命扩散的推演性论文，提出自复制探测器或快速扩张理论可能在数百万年内遍布银河系，从而为费米悖论提供思考方向。

items.title_en: Mark's Magic Multiply
items.title_zh: 马克的神奇乘法
items.summary_en: A playful note on a neat mental-math trick that speeds up multiplication. It showcases how a simple shortcut can make math feel almost magical.
items.summary_zh: 一篇轻松的短文，介绍一个神奇的心算乘法技巧，让乘法变得更快、像魔法一样有趣。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a navigation app that displays weather along the route
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个在路线沿线显示天气的导航应用
items.summary_en: A navigation app that overlays weather along the route, helping users anticipate conditions. The project touches on data freshness, performance, and UX trade-offs for map apps.
items.summary_zh: 一个在导航路线沿线显示天气的应用，帮助用户提前预判出行条件。项目涉及数据新鲜度、性能以及地图应用中的用户体验取舍。

items.title_en: Cooperative Vectors Introduction
items.title_zh: 合作向量介绍
items.summary_en: An introductory piece on cooperative vectors, outlining how vector representations can encode collaboration and coordination in multi-agent settings. The article sketches potential uses in optimization and AI systems, suggesting a framework for studying cooperative behavior in computational contexts.
items.summary_zh: 本文对合作向量进行了入门介绍，阐释如何通过向量表示编码多智能体环境中的协作与协同。文章勾勒出在优化与 AI 系统中的潜在应用，并提出用于研究计算场景中合作行为的框架。

items.title_en: Reducto releases Deep Extract
items.title_zh: Reducto 发布 Deep Extract
items.summary_en: Reducto launches Deep Extract, an AI agent that extracts structured data from unstructured sources. This promises to streamline data wrangling, turning messy text into usable datasets.
items.summary_zh: Reducto 推出 Deep Extract，一款能够从非结构化数据中提取结构化数据的 AI 代理。它有望简化数据清洗流程，将凌乱文本转化为可用的数据集。

items.title_en: SideX – A Tauri-based port of Visual Studio Code
items.title_zh: SideX：一个基于 Tauri 的 Visual Studio Code 端口
items.summary_en: SideX is a Visual Studio Code-like editor built on Tauri, offering a native-like VS Code experience with a lighter footprint and improved security isolation. By leveraging Rust and a minimal runtime, it avoids Electron bloat while maintaining familiar workflows. This matters for developers who want a self-contained editor without heavy dependencies.
items.summary_zh: SideX 是一个基于 Tauri 的 Visual Studio Code 风格编辑器，提供接近原生的体验，同时降低资源占用并提升安全隔离。通过使用 Rust 与更小的运行时，它摆脱了 Electron 的臃肿并保持熟悉的工作流。对于想要无需大量依赖的自包含编辑器的开发者，这很有吸引力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Hormuz Havoc, a satirical game that got overrun by AI bots in 24 hours
items.title_zh: Show HN: Hormuz Havoc，一款讽刺游戏在24小时内被 AI 机器人大规模涌入
items.summary_en: Hormuz Havoc, a satirical game, was overrun by AI bots within 24 hours, illustrating how open platforms can be rapidly flooded by automated agents. The incident spotlights bot resilience in online environments and the need for stronger anti-bot defenses.
items.summary_zh: Hormuz Havoc 这款讽刺性游戏在24小时内就被 AI 机器人席卷，显示开放平台容易被自动化代理迅速占据的风险。此次事件凸显在线环境中对抗机器人攻击的难度与对更强反 bot 措施的需求。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Relvy (YC F24) – On-call runbooks, automated
items.title_zh: Relvy（YC F24）上线：在岗运行手册自动化
items.summary_en: Relvy provides automated on-call runbooks to guide incident response and reduce toil, aiming to shorten recovery time and improve reliability for operations teams.
items.summary_zh: Relvy 提供自动化的在岗运行手册，帮助事件响应流程更高效、降低工作强度，目标是缩短修复时间、提升运维可靠性。

items.title_en: Doing Impressions: Monet's Early Caricatures (ca. late 1850s)
items.title_zh: 莫奈的早期讽刺画（约19世纪50年代末）
items.summary_en: Showcases Monet's lesser-known early caricatures from the late 1850s, revealing a playful, experimental edge before his signature impressionism. The collection highlights how even master painters used caricature as a study of form and social observation, foreshadowing later stylistic shifts.
items.summary_zh: 展示莫奈在19世纪50年代末的不为人知的早期讽刺画，揭示了他在印象派成型前的玩味与实验性。作品强调即便是大师也以讽刺画来研究造型与社会观察，预示着日后风格的转变。

items.title_en: RSoC 2026: A new CPU scheduler for Redox OS
items.title_zh: RSoC 2026 为 Redox OS 引入新的 CPU 调度器
items.summary_en: RSoC 2026 introduces a new CPU scheduler for Redox OS, aiming to improve fairness and throughput in this Rust-based OS. The project demonstrates ongoing evolution of microkernel ecosystems and how scheduling choices impact performance in unique OS architectures.
items.summary_zh: RSoC 2026 为 Redox OS 引入一款新的 CPU 调度器，旨在提升公平性和吞吐量。这体现了在 Rust 驱动的微内核系统中，调度设计对性能和伸缩性的直接影响。

items.title_en: The Art of Risk Management (2017)
items.title_zh: 风险管理艺术（2017）
items.summary_en: BCG's 2017 piece on risk management outlines practical frameworks for identifying, quantifying, and mitigating strategic and financial risks, with emphasis on governance, scenario planning, and disciplined decision-making.
items.summary_zh: BCG 2017 年的风险管理文章提出了识别、量化和降低战略与财务风险的实用框架，强调治理、情景规划和纪律性决策。

items.title_en: Winners of the 2026 Kokuyo Design Awards
items.title_zh: 2026 年 Kokuyo 设计大奖获奖作品
items.summary_en: The 2026 Kokuyo Design Awards winners showcase trends in office and product design, from ergonomic furniture to smart, tech-enabled accessories. The picks emphasize sustainability, user experience, and hybrid-work innovations. For tech readers, the awards hint at how design and usability will shape daily workflows.
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 Kokuyo 设计大奖获奖作品体现了办公与产品设计的趋势，从符合人体工学的家具到智能化配件。作品聚焦可持续性、用户体验与混合工作场景的创新。对技术读者而言，结果暗示设计与可用性将如何塑造日常工作流程。

items.title_en: Floyd's Sampling Algorithm
items.title_zh: Floyd 的采样算法
items.summary_en: A practical explainer of Floyd's sampling algorithm, detailing how it draws samples efficiently from a distribution or combinatorial structure, with potential ML or scientific computing uses.
items.summary_zh: Floyd 的采样算法提供了一种高效从离散分布中抽样的技术思路，适用于概率建模、统计仿真等场景。文章通常会结合实现要点与复杂度分析，帮助读者在实际代码中落地。

items.title_en: Show HN: Explore the Silk Roads through an interactive map
items.title_zh: Show HN：通过互动地图探索丝绸之路
items.summary_en: An interactive map lets users explore Silk Road routes, trade hubs, and historical context with geospatial visuals. It provides a tangible way to study ancient globalization and networked exchange.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动地图让用户通过地理信息和历史情境直观探索丝绸之路的路线、节点及贸易网络，为研究古代全球化提供直观工具。

items.title_en: Virtual Mars Traverse: Every inch of Curiosity rover's path since 2012 landing
items.title_zh: 虚拟火星穿越：自 2012 年着陆以来好奇号轨迹的逐寸展示
items.summary_en: An interactive visualization that maps Curiosity rover's path inch-by-inch since its 2012 landing, offering insights into mission planning, terrain challenges, and how movement data translates into science goals.
items.summary_zh: 一个互动可视化，逐寸展示自 2012 年着陆以来好奇号在火星上的轨迹，揭示任务规划、地形挑战，以及如何将移动数据转化为科学目标。

items.title_en: Why I'm Building a Database Engine in C#
items.title_zh: 为何用 C# 构建数据库引擎
items.summary_en: Building a database engine in C# to explore language/runtime trade-offs, safety, and developer productivity.
items.summary_zh: 作者用 C# 构建数据库引擎，借此评估语言与运行时的取舍、内存安全与开发效率。文章分享架构决策、性能目标和对构建数据系统的启示。

items.title_en: C++: Freestanding Standard Library
items.title_zh: C++：无系统依赖的标准库
items.summary_en: Freestanding standard library for C++ enables building apps without a host OS, opening paths for embedded, bootloader, or OS-less runtimes.
items.summary_zh: C++ 的无系统依赖标准库让开发者可以在没有操作系统的环境中工作，如引导加载程序与嵌入式场景。文章讨论实现自由度、可移植性与与传统标准库的区别。

items.title_en: SOM: A minimal Smalltalk for teaching of and research on Virtual Machines
items.title_zh: SOM：用于教学与研究虚拟机的最小 Smalltalk
items.summary_en: SOM is a minimal Smalltalk-inspired environment designed for teaching and VM research, serving as an approachable platform to explore object-oriented VM concepts. Its compact design and educational focus make it useful for classroom labs and experimental studies in virtual machines. It can help illustrate language runtimes and OS-level ideas.
items.summary_zh: SOM 是一个极简的 Smalltalk 风格环境，面向教学与虚拟机研究，便于学习面向对象的虚拟机概念。它的紧凑设计和教育目标适合课堂实验与虚拟机相关的研究，帮助学生理解语言运行时与操作系统层面的思路。

items.title_en: Tiny Corp's Exabox
items.title_zh: Tiny Corp 的 Exabox
items.summary_en: Tiny Corp's Exabox is showcased as a compact compute device designed for edge AI experiments and offline workloads, reflecting a trend toward small, open hardware that lowers barriers to experimentation. For developers and small teams, it signals faster iteration cycles and hands-on experimentation.
items.summary_zh: Tiny Corp 的 Exabox 被展现为一款紧凑型计算设备，面向边缘 AI 实验与离线 workloads，体现出小型开源硬件正在降低实验门槛。对开发者和小团队来说，意味着更快的迭代与实际动手的机会。

items.title_en: My university uses prompt injection to catch cheaters
items.title_zh: 我的大学用提示注入来抓作弊者
items.summary_en: Universities experiment with prompt-injection tactics to catch AI-assisted cheating, using hidden prompts or clever prompt design to expose illicit behavior. It exemplifies the ongoing game between educators and students in the age of AI.
items.summary_zh: 高校正在采用提示注入等手段来发现 AI 辅助作弊行为，利用隐藏提示或巧妙的提示设计揭露违规。此举体现了 AI 时代教师与学生之间持续的博弈。

items.title_en: State of Homelab 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年家庭实验室现状
items.summary_en: A survey of home labs in 2026 highlights evolving hobbyist setups, with popular virtualization stacks, compact hardware, and a push toward automation and energy efficiency. It offers practical guidance for enthusiasts building compact, affordable labs.
items.summary_zh: 对2026年家庭实验室的现状进行调查，揭示了流行的虚拟化架构、紧凑型硬件，以及对自动化与节能的重视。为希望以有限空间和预算搭建个人实验室的爱好者提供实用建议。

items.title_en: Bouncer: Block "crypto", "rage politics", and more from your X feed using AI
items.title_zh: Bouncer：用 AI 屏蔽 X 动态中的‘加密货币’、‘愤怒政治’等内容
items.summary_en: An open-source AI tool that blocks categories like crypto and rage politics from your X feed, giving users customizable moderation. It illustrates the potential and risks of automated content filtering on social feeds.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源 AI 工具，可按自定义策略从 X 动态中屏蔽加密货币、愤怒政治等类别，提升浏览体验。它展示了自动化内容过滤的潜力与局限性，以及对偏见和言论自由的权衡。

items.title_en: Cells for NetBSD: kernel-enforced, jail-like isolation
items.title_zh: NetBSD 的 Cells：内核级隔离
items.summary_en: NetBSD's Cells offer kernel-enforced isolation that behaves like a jail, allowing multiple secure compartments within a single OS instance. This enables safer multi-tenant setups and tighter control over resource usage without heavy virtualization.
items.summary_zh: NetBSD 的 Cells 提供内核强制的隔离，类似于 jail 的分区，允许在同一操作系统实例中部署多个安全环境。这为多租户场景提供更安全的资源边界，同时降低虚拟化开销。

items.title_en: How Costco Won in Japan
items.title_zh: Costco 在日本取胜的原因
items.summary_en: A business analysis of Costco's success in Japan, covering localization, membership model, and supply-chain adaptations that helped win in a challenging market. The piece distills lessons for retailers expanding into culturally different markets.
items.summary_zh: 分析 Costco 在日本市场的成功要点，涵盖本地化策略、会员制与供应链调整，以及在文化差异显著的市场中的应对之道，供零售商借鉴。

items.title_en: Show HN: TUI-use: Let AI agents control interactive terminal programs
items.title_zh: Show HN：TUI-use——让 AI 代理控制交互式终端程序
items.summary_en: Show HN for a project that lets AI agents control interactive terminal programs. It demonstrates automating CLI workflows with natural-language interfaces, with implications for productivity and reproducibility, plus security considerations.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 的一个项目，将 AI 代理用于控制交互式终端程序。展示了通过自然语言界面对命令行工作流的自动化潜力，提升生产力与可重复性，同时需关注安全性。

items.title_en: The effects of caffeine consumption do not decay with a ~5 hour half-life
items.title_zh: 咖啡因效应并不随约5小时半衰期衰减
items.summary_en: A LessWrong piece argues caffeine's effects persist beyond a simple half-life model, with lingering wakefulness and performance impacts that don't neatly decay. This reframes personal caffeine strategies and experimental design around stimulant use.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 LessWrong 文章指出，咖啡因的效应并不符合简单的半衰期模型，清醒与表现的影响可能持续超出预期。此观点将重塑个人咖啡因使用策略与实验设计。

items.title_en: Optimization of 32-bit Unsigned Division by Constants on 64-bit Targets
items.title_zh: 在64位目标上对32位无符号常数除法的优化
items.summary_en: Proposes an optimization strategy for performing 32-bit unsigned division by constants on 64-bit targets, using precomputed multipliers and shifts to replace costly division instructions. The technique can help compilers generate faster code for numeric-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 提出在64位目标上将32位无符号常数除法替换为乘法因子和位移的优化方法，避免昂贵的除法指令。该技巧有助于编译器生成对数值密集型负载更高效的代码。

items.title_en: Map Gesture Controls - Control maps with your hands
items.title_zh: 地图手势控制：用手势来操作地图
items.summary_en: Map Gesture Controls demonstrates translating hand gestures into map interactions, enabling intuitive navigation without clicking. The project likely uses computer vision or depth sensors to interpret gestures and map them to pan, zoom, and rotate actions. It's a practical example of gesture-driven UX for complex interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 地图手势控制展示了如何将手势转化为地图交互，实现无鼠标的直观导航。该项目利用计算机视觉或传感器解析手势，并将其映射到平移、缩放与旋转等操作。为复杂界面提供了手势驱动的可用性实践示例。

items.title_en: Inflation Rose to 3.3% in March, Driven by Rising Fuel Costs
items.title_zh: 三月通胀升至 3.3%，燃料成本推动
items.summary_en: Inflation climbed to 3.3% in March, led by higher fuel costs, signaling ongoing economic pressures that can influence tech spending, hardware pricing, and cloud costs.
items.summary_zh: 三月通胀率上涨至 3.3%，燃料成本上涨是主要推动因素，可能影响个人和企业的成本结构、价格策略与云/硬件支出。

items.title_en: Reading Is Magic
items.title_zh: 阅读就是魔法
items.summary_en: A provocative essay arguing reading's power to boost cognition, empathy, and independent thinking; advocates deeper, regular reading in a noisy digital age.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章强调阅读的力量，认为高质量的阅读能提升认知、同理心与独立思考能力。作者在数字化生存环境下呼吁培养持续的阅读习惯以抵抗信息噪声。

items.title_en: What have been the greatest intellectual achievements? (2017)
items.title_zh: 人类最伟大的知识成就有哪些？（2017）
items.summary_en: A reflective list of landmark intellectual achievements, exploring why these feats mattered and what they reveal about scientific progress. It encourages thinking about future milestones with historical insight.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾并讨论人类历史上最伟大的智识成就，分析这些突破为何重要以及它们对科学与文明进步的启示。它也提醒我们在评估未来创新时需把握历史教训。

items.title_en: Vinyl Cache and Varnish Cache
items.title_zh: Vinyl Cache 与 Varnish Cache 简解
items.summary_en: Explains Vinyl Cache and Varnish Cache, compares philosophies, and guidance on when to use each. It highlights trade-offs between persistence, eviction policies, and deployment complexity.
items.summary_zh: 阐释 Vinyl Cache 与 Varnish Cache 的原理与对比，给出何时选用的建议，强调持久性、驱逐策略与部署复杂度之间的权衡。

items.title_en: The Harvard Library Passport
items.title_zh: 哈佛图书馆护照计划
items.summary_en: The Harvard Library Passport concept proposes portable tokens or stamps to access resources, balancing open standards with privacy controls. It invites reflection on digital identity in research infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 哈佛图书馆护照计划提出使用便携令牌/凭证来访问资源，力求在开放标准与隐私控制之间取得平衡。引发对研究基础设施中数字身份的思考。

items.title_en: Glasses Got Worse on Purpose
items.title_zh: 眼镜故意变差
items.summary_en: Glasses Got Worse on Purpose argues that eyewear is engineered to require more frequent replacement, critiquing industry practices and encouraging readers to scrutinize pricing and product lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 《眼镜故意变差》质疑眼镜行业出于商业逻辑让产品更易损耗、需要更频繁更换的做法，呼吁读者审视定价与生命周期。

items.title_en: The best seat in town
items.title_zh: 城里最好的座位
items.summary_en: This piece focuses on a standout seating experience, offering observations on how seat design can influence comfort, productivity, and social interaction. It provides insights relevant to designers and urban spaces.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章聚焦一个被誉为‘城里最佳座位’的地方，透视座位设计如何影响体验、工作效率与社交互动。

items.title_en: Why do we tell ourselves scary stories about AI?
items.title_zh: 为何人们会给 AI 编织可怕的故事？
items.summary_en: Explains cognitive biases and media dynamics that fuel scary AI narratives, urging readers to calibrate risk with probabilistic thinking and real-world limitations. It reframes fear as a call for rigorous evaluation rather than sensationalism.
items.summary_zh: 解析驱动对 AI 的惊慌叙事的认知偏误与媒体动力，倡导用概率思维和现实边界来校准风险。将恐惧转化为对严谨评估的呼吁，而非噱头化的煽动。

items.title_en: Iran's IRGC Publishes Satellite Imagery of OpenAI's $30B Stargate Datacenter
items.title_zh: 伊朗革命卫队公布 OpenAI Stargate 数据中心的卫星影像
items.summary_en: IRGC released satellite imagery of OpenAI's Stargate datacenter, highlighting geopolitical tensions surrounding AI infrastructure and potential security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗革命卫队公开了 OpenAI Stargate 数据中心的卫星影像，凸显围绕 AI 基础设施的地缘政治紧张与潜在安全议题。

items.title_en: Show HN: BAREmail ʕ·ᴥ·ʔ – minimalist Gmail client for bad WiFi
items.title_zh: BAREmail ʕ·ᴥ·ʔ——为差网速设计的极简 Gmail 客户端
items.summary_en: Introduces BAREmail, a minimalist Gmail client designed for bad WiFi with offline support and lean UI. It emphasizes resilience against flaky networks and a focused email experience.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 BAREmail——为差网速设计的极简 Gmail 客户端，具离线支持与精简界面，强调在不稳定网络环境下的鲁棒性与专注的邮件体验。

items.title_en: Women were never meant to give birth on their backs
items.title_zh: 女性并非注定要仰卧分娩
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the common practice of supine birth lacks evolutionary or ergonomic justification, tracing historical, cultural, and medical reasons behind the shift to back-lying delivery. It underscores how medical practice shapes childbirth choices and invites rethinking of positioning.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出仰卧分娩并非有进化或人体工学依据，追溯导致改用仰卧的历史、文化与医学原因。它强调医疗实践对分娩体位的影响，并呼吁重新思考分娩姿势。

items.title_en: Textbooks and Methods of Note-Taking in Early Modern Europe (2008)
items.title_zh: 早期现代欧洲的教科书与笔记方法（2008）
items.summary_en: The paper analyzes how early modern students used textbooks and note-taking methods, revealing practices that influenced knowledge transmission and pedagogy in that era.
items.summary_zh: 论文探讨早期现代欧洲的教科书使用与笔记方法，揭示当时知识传播、教学实践与学习方式的历史脉络。对教育史和信息组织的研究提供了有价值的比较视角。

items.title_en: Software Preservation Group: C++ History Collection
items.title_zh: 软件保护组：C++ 历史收藏
items.summary_en: Introduces the C++ History Collection from the Software Preservation Group, spotlighting artifacts and milestones that chart the language's evolution. The collection offers context for historians and developers interested in how C++ shaped modern software.
items.summary_zh: 介绍软件保护组的 C++ 历史收藏，聚焦于记录语言演变的文物与里程碑。该收藏为历史学者和开发者提供背景，帮助理解 C++ 如何塑造了现代软件。

items.title_en: No one owes you supply-chain security
items.title_zh: 没有人欠你供应链安全
items.summary_en: Security is a shared responsibility; no single party is solely responsible. The piece advocates proactive measures, verification, and resilience to strengthen supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 供应链安全不是某单一方的责任，需各方共同承担。文章倡导主动的安全实践、验证与韧性建设以提升整体安全性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Weird Clocks
items.title_zh: Show HN：怪异时钟
items.summary_en: Weird Clocks showcases unconventional clock designs or timekeeping concepts, likely a collection of novel UI/time displays. It highlights playful experimentation at the intersection of software, design, and time perception. Great for designers and curious engineers exploring alternative temporal interfaces.
items.summary_zh: Weird Clocks 展示了非常规的时钟设计与时间显示概念，结合软件、设计与时间感知的实验性作品。展现了在时间界面上的趣味性探索，适合设计师和好奇的工程师了解另类时间展示方式。

items.title_en: Scientists mapped all the nerves of the clitoris for the first time
items.title_zh: 科学家首次绘出阴蒂的全部神经分布
items.summary_en: A science update reporting the first complete map of clitoral nerves, marking a milestone in sexual health research with potential medical and educational impact.
items.summary_zh: 报道揭示了阴蒂神经分布的首次完整绘制，是性健康研究的重要里程碑，或对医疗教育产生影响。

items.title_en: Borges' cartographers and the tacit skill of reading LM output
items.title_zh: 博尔赫斯的制图师与解读语言模型输出的隐性技艺
items.summary_en: Discussions on reading language model outputs, echoing Borges' map-terrain ideas and stressing tacit skills to interpret model completions, including reliability, bias, and hidden assumptions.
items.summary_zh: 探讨解读语言模型输出的隐性技巧，如同博尔赫斯笔下的地图与现实的关系，强调识别可靠性、偏见与隐藏假设的能力。

items.title_en: One Brain to Query: Wiring a 60-Person Company into a Single Slack Bot
items.title_zh: 一个公司大脑：把60人的公司接入到单一 Slack 机器人
items.summary_en: A 'company brain' concept wires people, documents, and workflows into a single Slack bot for company-wide querying. The approach reduces context-switching and speeds up decision-making by providing instant access to people, policies, and project status.
items.summary_zh: “公司大脑”将人员、文档和工作流程整合到一个 Slack 机器人中，提升全员查询与协作的效率。该方法可以减少上下文切换、加速决策，便于快速获取人员信息、政策与项目状态。

items.title_en: Hobby CNC machining and resin casting (2015)
items.title_zh: 业余 CNC 加工与树脂铸造（2015）
items.summary_en: A 2015-era hobbyist note detailing CNC milling and resin casting techniques, tools, and projects. It serves as a historical snapshot of DIY fabrication practices and the gap between hobbyist experiments and professional manufacture.
items.summary_zh: 2015年的业余笔记，讲述CNC加工与树脂铸造的技巧、工具与项目，为DIY制造实践的历史快照，以及业余尝试与专业制造之间的差距。

items.title_en: Midnight Captain – A midnight commander inspired file manager
items.title_zh: Midnight Captain：受 Midnight Commander 启发的文件管理器
items.summary_en: Introduces Midnight Captain, a terminal file manager inspired by Midnight Commander, and outlines its design goals, dual-pane navigation, and fast, keyboard-centric UX.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Midnight Captain——受 Midnight Commander 启发的终端文件管理器，概述其设计目标、双窗格导航和以键盘为主的快速用户体验。

items.title_en: The Life and Death of the Book Review
items.title_zh: 书评的生死兴衰
items.summary_en: Examines the evolving world of book reviews, considering traditional criticism, online discourse, and AI's impact on judging books and guiding readers.
items.summary_zh: 探讨书评这一评注生态的演变，涵盖传统评论、在线讨论以及 AI 对评判书籍与引导读者的影响。

items.title_en: Stewart Brand on how progress happens
items.title_zh: 斯图尔特·布兰德：进步如何发生
items.summary_en: Brand discusses how progress happens via tinkering, slow adoption, and the social dynamics around technology. The piece offers actionable takeaways for teams aiming to accelerate impact without reckless leaps.
items.summary_zh: 布兰德讨论进步如何发生，强调尝试、渐进采用以及科技背后的社会动力。为团队提供在不过度冒险的前提下推动影响力的实用建议。

items.title_en: Simplest Hash Functions
items.title_zh: 最简单的哈希函数
items.summary_en: Ultra-simple hash functions can perform surprisingly well for non-adversarial tasks. The post surveys a few minimal constructions, analyzes their distribution and collision behavior, and explains where they are appropriate (like simple hash tables) and where they fail under attack.
items.summary_zh: 极其简单的哈希函数在非对抗场景下往往效果不错。文章演示了几种最简构造，分析分布与碰撞特性，并指出在哈希表等场景的适用性及在对抗性输入下的局限。

items.title_en: Stamp It: All programs must report their version
items.title_zh: Stamp It：所有程序必须暴露版本信息
items.summary_en: Stamp It argues that every program should publish a version stamp at startup to improve reproducibility, debugging, and security auditing. It offers practical strategies for embedding version metadata and discusses trade-offs for small scripts or embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: Stamp It 提出每个程序在启动时都应暴露版本信息，以提升可重复性、调试和安全审计能力。文中给出嵌入版本元数据的实用策略，并讨论小脚本或嵌入式系统的取舍。

items.title_en: Zed, A sans for the needs of 21st century
items.title_zh: Zed：面向21世纪需求的无衬线字体
items.summary_en: Zed is Typotheque's sans-serif designed for modern reading needs, with features like high legibility on screens, versatile weights, and multilingual support. It showcases how typography aims to balance readability, aesthetic versatility, and web-friendliness in a global context.
items.summary_zh: Zed 是 Typotheque 设计的现代无衬线字体，强调在屏幕上提高可读性、提供多样的粗细与广泛的语言支持。它体现了在全球化语境下追求可读性、美学灵活性与网页友好性的字体设计思路。

items.title_en: Why meaningful days look like nothing while you are living them
items.title_zh: 有意义的日子在当下看起来平淡无奇
items.summary_en: Meaningful days often feel ordinary in real time; significance emerges in hindsight. The piece invites readers to slow down and savor small moments, or capture them to preserve memory, since meaning accrues with reflection rather than immediate awe.
items.summary_zh: 有意义的日子在当下常常显得平淡，真正的价值往往在事后回看时才浮现。文章鼓励人们放慢脚步，留意日常中的细小瞬间，或通过记录来保存记忆，因为意义是在反思中积累的。

items.title_en: The Training Example Lie Bracket
items.title_zh: 训练示例 Lie 括号
items.summary_en: The post uses Lie brackets as a metaphor to critique how training examples shape model behavior, offering a compact lens on data influence.
items.summary_zh: 本文以 Lie 括号作为隐喻，批评训练样本如何影响模型行为，提供对数据影响的简明视角。

items.title_en: Haunt, the 70s text adventure game, is now playable on a website
items.title_zh: 70年代文本冒险游戏 Haunt 现可在网页上玩
items.summary_en: A classic 1970s text adventure, Haunt, is now playable on the web, letting modern players experience parser-driven storytelling without any setup. The project preserves vintage interactive fiction using browser technology, highlighting how retro games can reach new audiences.
items.summary_zh: 经典的1970年代文本冒险游戏 Haunt 现已在网页上可玩，现代玩家无需额外设置即可体验解析器驱动的叙事。这一项目通过浏览器技术实现对老式交互式小说的保存与传播，展示了复古游戏的跨世代可访问性。

items.title_en: Apple removes Lebanese village names from Apple Maps as Israel attacks
items.title_zh: 苹果在以色列袭击时从 Apple 地图移除了黎巴嫩村庄名
items.summary_en: The report alleges Apple removed Lebanese village names from maps amid Israeli attacks, illustrating how mapping choices can reflect geopolitical pressures. It raises questions about censorship, localization, and the role of tech platforms in conflict reporting.
items.summary_zh: 据报导，苹果在冲突背景下从地图中移除了黎巴嫩村庄的名称，这凸显了地图制图与地缘政治压力之间的互动。此事引发关于审查、在地化和科技平台在冲突报道中的角色的讨论。

items.title_en: Compute iOS XNU offset from kernel cache
items.title_zh: 从内核缓存中计算 iOS XNU 偏移量
items.summary_en: A technical post shows how to extract kernel XNU offsets from iOS kernel caches, enabling exploit development or security research; it highlights kernel security design and jailbreaking implications.
items.summary_zh: 技术博文展示如何从 iOS 内核缓存中计算 XNU 偏移量，用于调试和安全研究，涉及内核结构和地址空间等细节。此类工作强调对内核安全设计的理解和对越狱/漏洞研究的影响。

items.title_en: JPMorgan warns Tesla stock could sink 60% in new note
items.title_zh: 摩根大通在新报告中警告特斯拉股价可能下跌60%
items.summary_en: A JPMorgan note warns Tesla stock could fall about 60%, citing concerns that span demand, competition, and valuation risk. The note adds to the ongoing debate about electric-vehicle market dynamics and investor sentiment.
items.summary_zh: 一份摩根大通的报告警告特斯拉股价可能下跌约60%，理由涉及需求、竞争与估值风险等因素。这进一步加剧了对电动汽车市场趋势与投资者情绪的讨论。

items.title_en: Is Math Big or Small?
items.title_zh: 数学到底是大还是小？
items.summary_en: A talk that challenges whether mathematical ideas live at a 'big' scale or can be built from small, composable units. It sketches how mathematical abstractions scale in theory and computation, with implications for teaching, formalization, and tool-building.
items.summary_zh: 讨论数学到底是由少数“大”概念驱动，还是由大量可组合的小概念构成。演讲主张将数学视作模块化领域，强调简单且易理解的基本单元如何组合出复杂结构，并探讨对教学、形式化和工具开发的影响。

items.title_en: Study investigates how mass distribution of baseball bat affects performance
items.title_zh: 研究调查棒球棒质量分布对表现的影响
items.summary_en: A study investigates how mass distribution in baseball bats affects performance, with findings supporting end-weight designs and their impact on swing dynamics, relevant for equipment design and analytics.
items.summary_zh: 研究探讨棒球棒的质量分布如何影响击球表现，结果支持末端配重设计对挥杆动力学的影响，对装备设计与数据分析具有参考价值。

items.title_en: AMD AI director says Claude Code is becoming dumber and lazier since update
items.title_zh: AMD AI 总监称 Claude Code 自更新后变得更笨、更懒
items.summary_en: AMD's AI director notes regression in Claude Code after updates, suggesting that model quality can degrade with rapid iterations. Highlights reliability challenges in fast-moving AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: AMD 的 AI 总监指出 Claude Code 在更新后出现性能下降，表明快速迭代可能带来的质量波动。这揭示了快速变化的 AI 工具在可靠性方面的挑战。

items.title_en: Why do Macs ask you to press random keys when connecting a new keyboard?
items.title_zh: Mac 在连接新键盘时为何要你按下任意按键？
items.summary_en: Explains the rationale behind macOS prompting random key presses when pairing a new keyboard, including device verification, key mapping calibration, and anti-spoofing considerations.
items.summary_zh: 解释 macOS 在连接新键盘时要求按任意键的原因，涵盖设备验证、按键映射校准以及防伪攻击的考量。

items.title_en: Sybilproof reputation mechanisms (2005) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 防 Sybil 攻击的声誉机制（2005）[PDF]
items.summary_en: This classic 2005 paper proposes reputation-based mechanisms to prevent Sybil attacks in distributed systems. It remains influential for understanding how to build trust in decentralized networks and has informed later work in P2P systems and blockchain governance.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 2005 年的经典论文提出了基于声誉的机制来防止分布式系统中的 Sybil 攻击。它对在去中心化网络中建立信任的理解影响深远，也为后续的 P2P 与区块链治理研究提供了参考。

items.title_en: NYC Families Need over $125,000 in Income to Live in Any Borough
items.title_zh: 纽约市家庭在任何区都需年收入超过125,000美元
items.summary_en: Bloomberg reports that NYC families need more than $125k in annual income to live in any borough, highlighting housing costs and regional affordability challenges. The figure matters for tech workers and urban policy, shaping where talent can afford to live and how teams recruit locally. It underscores the gap between wages and living expenses in major cities.
items.summary_zh: 彭博报道，纽约市家庭在任何一个区都需要超过12.5万美元的年收入才能居住，反映出住房成本与地区可负担性的挑战。这一数字对科技工作者与城市政策影响重大，决定了人才的居住地点与招聘策略。揭示大城市薪资与生活成本之间的差距。

items.title_en: I Replaced Kafka, Redis, and RabbitMQ with One Tool – A Deep Dive into NATS
items.title_zh: 我用一个工具替代 Kafka、Redis 和 RabbitMQ：深入了解 NATS
items.summary_en: A deep dive into NATS argues replacing Kafka, Redis, and RabbitMQ with a single tool can simplify architecture and reduce ops overhead. It covers benefits like simplicity and performance, plus trade-offs around durability, features, and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 对 NATS 的深入分析认为用一个工具替代 Kafka、Redis 和 RabbitMQ 能简化架构并降低运维成本。文章讨论了简化与性能等好处，同时也指出在持久性、功能与生态成熟度方面的权衡。

items.title_en: What happens when a destructor throws
items.title_zh: 当析构函数抛出异常会怎样
items.summary_en: The article explains the consequences of exceptions thrown from destructors, a situation languages like C++ must handle carefully. It covers safety guarantees, potential program termination, and best practices to avoid leaving resources in an inconsistent state.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解了析构函数抛出异常的后果，这在 C++ 等语言中需要小心处理。内容涵盖安全性保证、可能导致的程序终止，以及避免资源处于不一致状态的最佳实践。

items.title_en: What does ⍋⍋ even mean? (2023)
items.title_zh: ⍋⍋ 到底是什么意思？（2023）
items.summary_en: A retrospective on the APL grade operator, clarifying its semantics with concrete examples and tracing how ⍋⍋ behaves in data sorting and grouping. Provides historical context to demystify the symbol for modern readers.
items.summary_zh: 回顾 APL 中 grade 运算符⍋⍋的语义，通过具体示例阐明其在排序与分组中的行为，并追溯其历史背景，帮助现代读者理解这一符号。

items.title_en: Inside a Corporate Retreat That Went Very Badly Wrong
items.title_zh: 一场企业内部 retreat 演变成严重失控的案例
items.summary_en: WSJ piece about a corporate retreat that went badly wrong, highlighting mismanagement, culture issues, and perhaps harm to employees. It explores what went wrong and the lessons for leadership, risk management, and employee well-being in corporate culture.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 WSJ 报道讲述了一场企业团建活动如何演变成严重失控的事件，揭示管理失误与企业文化的问题。文章探讨了领导力、风险控制及员工福祉在团建中的重要性，以及从中可吸取的教训。

items.title_en: A New Way to Spray Paint Color
items.title_zh: 一种喷涂颜色的新方法
items.summary_en: A new technique for spray-paint color creation delivers finer control of color mixtures and tones, expanding the palette and reducing waste in coating processes. The method uses precise deposition and feedback to achieve stable hues for manufacturing and art.
items.summary_zh: 一种喷涂颜色的新技术实现对颜色混合与色调的更精确控制，扩展了调色范围并减少涂覆过程中的浪费。该方法通过精确喷涂和实时反馈来稳定色调，适用于制造与艺术场景。

items.title_en: Root Persistence via macOS Recovery Mode Safari
items.title_zh: 通过 macOS 恢复模式的 Safari 实现根权限持久性
items.summary_en: A macOS Safari in Recovery Mode weakness could grant persistent root write access, enabling attackers to survive reboots and potentially evade standard security controls. The disclosure underscores the attack surface in recovery environments and the need for mitigations and secure defaults. It reminds defenders to harden recovery workflows and monitor for abuse.
items.summary_zh: 展示了在 macOS 恢复模式下的 Safari 漏洞可实现对根权限的持久性，攻击者可在重启后保持访问并规避常见安全控制。这暴露了恢复环境的攻击面，也强调了改进默认设置与缓解策略的必要性。提醒防守方加强恢复工作流的安全性并监控潜在滥用。

items.title_en: App Store sees 84% surge in new apps as AI coding tools take off
items.title_zh: 应用商店新应用数量激增 84%：AI 编码工具兴起
items.summary_en: New app submissions to the App Store jumped about 84%, signaling AI-assisted coding is accelerating software creation. The trend boosts indie development but also raises questions about quality control, review throughput, and platform policy.
items.summary_zh: 应用商店的新应用提交量约增长 84%，显示 AI 辅助编码正在加速软件创作。此趋势推动独立开发者产出，但也引发质量把控、审核速度及平台政策方面的讨论。

items.title_en: "AI polls" are fake polls
items.title_zh: "AI polls" 是假民调
items.summary_en: Argues that AI-generated polls are not true polls, highlighting biases and methodological flaws that misrepresent public opinion. Calls for skepticism and rigorous polling practices.
items.summary_zh: 指出 AI 生成的投票并非真实民调，揭示其中的偏见与方法论缺陷，不能准确反映公众意见。呼吁对这类数据保持警惕并采用更严格的民调方法。

items.title_en: Artemis II Lunar Flyby (Official Broadcast)
items.title_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯 II 月球飞掠（官方直播）
items.summary_en: Artemis II will perform a lunar flyby, and NASA is offering an official broadcast for space enthusiasts. The mission tests crewed lunar capabilities and builds momentum for the next Moon missions.
items.summary_zh: 阿尔忒弥斯 II 将执行月球掠过，官方将提供直播，方便太空爱好者观看。此次任务检验载人月球能力并为未来月球任务积累动力。

items.title_en: ACE on a USB-HDMI Adapter
items.title_zh: 在 USB‑HDMI 适配器上的 ACE
items.summary_en: Demonstrates running ACE on a USB‑HDMI adapter, showcasing hardware‑level compatibility and potential for compact AI or compute tasks on consumer hardware. The experiment hints at how off‑the‑shelf adapters could support lightweight workloads without dedicated GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 在 USB‑HDMI 适配器上实现 ACE 的演示，展示了商用硬件的兼容性及在小型设备上执行轻量化工作负载的潜力。该实验暗示了现成适配器在不依赖专用 GPU 的情况下也能支持某些计算任务的可能性。

items.title_en: How Paris swapped cars for bikes – and transformed its streets
items.title_zh: 巴黎如何用自行车占据街头并改造街区
items.summary_en: Paris's shift from cars to bikes, with redesigned streets and safer cycling networks, reshapes urban mobility and reduces emissions. The transformation offers a blueprint for other cities pursuing livable, tech-enabled streets.
items.summary_zh: 巴黎将街道从汽车转向自行车，改造了道路并提升了骑行安全，重塑了城市出行并降低排放。这一转变为其他城市打造宜居、以科技赋能的街区提供了可借鉴的蓝本。

items.title_en: Make your own ColecoVision at home, part 5
items.title_zh: 在家制作 ColecoVision：第五部分
items.summary_en: Part 5 of the ColecoVision homebrew series continues with assembly, wiring, and debugging for reviving a retro console at home. It highlights the hacker culture around classic platforms and practical guidance for parts and measurements.
items.summary_zh: ColecoVision 家用改造系列第五部分继续讲解在家复兴这款复古主机的组装、布线与调试。展现了对经典平台的硬件黑客文化，以及对元件选择与测量的实用建议。

items.title_en: LLM plays an 8-bit Commander X16 game using structured "smart senses"
items.title_zh: LLM 使用结构化“智能感知”玩8位Commander X16游戏
items.summary_en: An LLM plays an 8-bit Commander X16 game using structured 'smart senses' to perceive the game state and decide actions. The work demonstrates progress in giving language models interpretable inputs for emulator-based tasks.
items.summary_zh: LLM利用结构化的“智能感知”来感知8位Commander X16游戏的状态并选择行动，展示了语言模型在仿真器任务中的可解释输入能力的进展。

items.title_en: 14,000 Images of the French Revolution Released Online (2014)
items.title_zh: 公开上线的 14,000 张法国大革命图片（2014）
items.summary_en: Highlights a 2014 release of 14,000 French Revolution images, offering researchers rich primary sources and raising questions about copyright, attribution, and the potential for educational and creative reuse.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦于 2014 年公开发布的 14,000 张法国大革命图片，为研究者提供丰富的一手资料，同时引发关于版权、署名与再利用的讨论。

items.title_en: Meta is set to pay its top AI executives almost a billion each in bonuses
items.title_zh: Meta 将向其顶级 AI 高管支付近十亿美元的奖金
items.summary_en: Meta plans nearly $1B in bonuses for its top AI executives if targets are met, underscoring how AI milestones are tying executive compensation to performance. The plan highlights the high-stakes AI race and raises questions about incentive structures and long-term governance.
items.summary_zh: Meta 计划在达成目标的情况下向其顶级 AI 高管支付近 10 亿美元奖金，凸显将 AI 里程碑与高管绩效挂钩的激励机制。此举反映出 AI 竞争的高风险性，同时引发对激励结构与长期治理的思考。

items.title_en: Hungary Is a Laboratory for Illiberal Nationalism. The Results Are In
items.title_zh: 匈牙利是 illiberal nationalism 的实验室，结果已出炉
items.summary_en: An analysis argues Hungary serves as a lab for illiberal nationalism, with evidence of democratic backsliding and centralized power. For tech policy readers, the piece highlights how governance models shape digital rights, platform regulation, and data stewardship across society.
items.summary_zh: 分析认为匈牙利是非自由民粹民族主义的试验场，存在民主倒退与权力高度集中等证据。对科技与政策读者而言，该文章强调治理模式如何影响数字权利、平台监管与全社会的数据治理。

items.title_en: Show HN: Docking – extensible Linux dock in Python
items.title_zh: Show HN：Docking——可扩展的 Linux Dock，基于 Python
items.summary_en: Docking is an extensible Linux dock implemented in Python, enabling plugin-like extensions to customize panel behavior. It showcases rapid, Python-based customization in the Linux desktop space, appealing to power users who want fast, keyboard-driven data work without GUI overhead. If you value extensibility and Python tooling, you’ll find this interesting.
items.summary_zh: Docking 是一个用 Python 实现的可扩展 Linux Dock，支持通过插件方式自定义面板行为。它展示了在 Linux 桌面领域快速、基于 Python 的定制能力，适合追求高可扩展性的高级用户。若你看重可扩展性与 Python 工具链，这个项目值得关注。

items.title_en: Several Mac mini and Mac Studio configs are now out of stock at Apple
items.title_zh: 苹果几款 Mac mini 与 Mac Studio 配置缺货
items.summary_en: Notes widespread stockouts of multiple Mac mini and Mac Studio configurations, signaling shifts in supply and demand and potentially affecting fast upgrade paths for developers and creators.
items.summary_zh: 指出多款 Mac mini 与 Mac Studio 配置普遍缺货，反映供需变化，可能影响开发者和创作者的快速升级计划。

items.title_en: Brocards for Vulnerability Triage
items.title_zh: 用于漏洞分级的纸牌方法（Brocards）
items.summary_en: Introduces Brocards for vulnerability triage, a card-based approach to standardize prioritization and speed up decision-making in security workflows.
items.summary_zh: 介绍用于漏洞分级的纸牌方法（Brocards），通过卡片化标准化优先级排序，加速安全工作流中的决策过程。

items.title_en: Great at gaming? US air traffic control wants you to apply
items.title_zh: 美国空管局：会玩游戏的你也能来申请
items.summary_en: US air traffic control is inviting applicants who excel at gaming, arguing that fast decision-making, pattern recognition, and hand-eye coordination transfer well to radar-based airspace management. The piece outlines the recruitment push, training pathway, and how a gamer mindset can translate into a regulated, high-stakes role.
items.summary_zh: 美国空中交通管制部门正在招募擅长游戏的人才，声称快速决策、模式识别和手眼协调可迁移到雷达监控的空域管理工作。文章介绍招募计划、培训路径，以及游戏思维在受监管的高风险岗位中的潜在作用。

items.title_en: Building Slogbox
items.title_zh: 构建 Slogbox
items.summary_en: Devlog chronicles the building of Slogbox, detailing architecture decisions, challenges, and lessons learned for anyone crafting a similar tooling project.
items.summary_zh: 开发日志记录了构建 Slogbox 的过程，描述架构决策、遇到的挑战，以及对同类工具项目的经验教训。

items.title_en: Tesla's supervised self-driving software gets Dutch okay, first in Europe
items.title_zh: 荷兰批准特斯拉的受监管自动驾驶，欧洲首例
items.summary_en: Dutch regulators give Tesla's supervised self-driving software the green light, marking Europe’s first approval for this kind of system. The move signals regulatory progress toward broader, safer deployment of driver-assistance tech and could influence EU policy.
items.summary_zh: 荷兰监管机构批准特斯拉的受监管自动驾驶软件，成为欧洲第一批获批此类系统的市场。这一进展可能推动更广泛且更安全的驾驶辅助技术在欧盟的部署与监管政策。

items.title_en: Researchers used AI to analyze 400k Reddit posts, revealing GLP-1 side effects
items.title_zh: 研究人员使用 AI 分析 40 万条 Reddit 帖子，揭示 GLP-1 副作用
items.summary_en: AI analysis of 400k Reddit posts surfaces unreported GLP-1 drug side effects, offering early signals for pharmacovigilance beyond official reports. The approach shows the potential of social-media mining for real-world safety monitoring, while noting the need for clinical validation.
items.summary_zh: 通过 AI 分析 40 万条 Reddit 帖子，揭示 GLP-1 药物的未被官方报道的副作用，提供早期的药物安全信号。该方法展示了利用社交媒体数据进行真实世界安全监测的潜力，同时需进行临床验证。
